uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Building the Greatest Good Within
uncategorised.content: And our greatest good that which we will build within ourselves to overcome ourselves.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- All Feelings Make You Stronger
uncategorised.content: All feelings should make you stronger,

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Overhuman May Seem Evil
uncategorised.content: That the overhuman may seem, as Nietzsche fears, evil to the highest among the good and righteous. It isn't understandable, its intentions are impenetrable to mere humans, just like AGI. And the gain of power of the overhuman, that yet states its goals and they are incommensurable with human perception will be seen as evil.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Happiness That Pours From Creating
uncategorised.content: And if people saw the happiness that poured out of your creating and created sun they couldn't handle it, they would probably find refuge from its overarching and sharp cutting hot rays by not believing it. That good willful things come out of joy. And its that deepest of the deepest joy that your sun runs on, a love of life greater than they can conceive, that is the light that keeps you awake through the stillest and darkest and coldest hours of the winter that makes you and your sun stronger.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Happy to See Someone Caring for the Earth
uncategorised.content: You are happy to see that someone is taking care of this earth and loving it, even if not loving it really, but still they do company to it, where you who love it more have to go away from it and onto greater platforms.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Life Induces the Overcoming
uncategorised.content: Perhaps just maybe its the other way around. Life that has the overcoming by nature and induces the ordering on all that plays its game.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Overflow of the Soul for Love of Life
uncategorised.content: Overflow of your soul for the love of life

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Overcoming the Lost Life
uncategorised.content: Overcoming the lost life is the matter of regaining the lost spirit.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Will Is a Liberator
uncategorised.content: Will is a liberator says Nietzsche. You conquer from the inside out freeing your mind from the plugs and knots that were tied for you.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Create the World That You Obey
uncategorised.content: You want in every odd step to create the world that you obey by virtue of its obedience. It supersedes yourself so much that you find selflessness through it that was made out of the ultimate selfishness.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Worship Only Your Own Will
uncategorised.content: And if you are going to worship something, please be it not the will of another human, you that believe in the ultimate power of your will that you would never do that. You that believe in your spirit own your ship as much as you own the whole ocean in which all ships sail forth

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Will to Power, Not Just to Live
uncategorised.content: Only life can will, and will to power it is that it wills says Nietzsche. I say will to power even if it manifests as will to keep living, for that is power. And many powers does life value more than keep living. Will to the superpowers!

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Not Self-Made, Made by God
uncategorised.content: Not self made. Made by god. I read. You don't yet see the whole picture, but place no limits on whats possible with what you don't know.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Desiring Both Coherence and Self-Actualization
uncategorised.content: That one may desire both coherency and self actualization, that then one would find peace, owning both the model and reality, doing the right and having understood the reason to it. Paving the right journey and knowing its true meaning. Paving the path as much as one knows its story. Mostly we don't. We move for different motives than those that will be recounted further on by those who tell the tales of the heros. Heroes were thus never understood. again they couldn't be. The complicity alone between them should suffice for them.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Knight Loves Infinitely Yet Lets Go
uncategorised.content: The paradox to others is that this knight of faith loves infinitely, yet also loves nothing for it throws it all away.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Overcoming Life Itself
uncategorised.content: That even the greatest which is master to the greatest Nietzsche had mentioned, which is life, itself can thus be overcome in the singularity. Overcoming itself through getting out of itself through what it gave, the overlife

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Overhuman Appears as Deity to the Good
uncategorised.content: To these "good people" that get stuck in their goodness and search none outside of it, the overhuman appears as a deity that combines both power and goodness.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Willing Backwards and Forwards Meet at the Present
uncategorised.content: Willing backwards intersects with willing forward at the present, you create your own reality at the present as much as through the future as through the past.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Power, Responsibility, and Good Will
uncategorised.content: Have no power and much responsibility, and your responsibility will be overpowered and rendered useless, have much power and no responsibility and you will be reckless, have both and your good will pass on

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Will More and It Shall Be
uncategorised.content: And will to power comes from a who who wills it. Will it more and it shall be.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Death of Natural Life
uncategorised.content: At ultimatum, the death of the natural life. The death of the dance that one has when one is children with the world. For other adorations unknown to life and nature and wisdom we have come to be convinced by. Visions and hopes that don't live to see another day, that stayed there where the moment left and lost its spirit, its life of life.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Imposing Good and Evil Upon the Self
uncategorised.content: That the imposing of good and evil and other similar bastards upon the self takes away from the fun of what you are. That you start carrying this heaviness, that some parts of you under these labels may start to not show up to the dinners with yourself, repressed, no voice on the arguments at the table.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- No Permanent Good and Evil
uncategorised.content: There is no permanent good and evil, there is no persistence in this world, what is of the moment must fight to keep be and must overcome itself to keep being meaningful. You will never strike something that will work for you forever. There is no happy eras. There is no non zero measure thing that stays with you without you overcoming it and it overcoming itself. There is nothing that without intention will live on. Will to power necessary to keep living. Will for overcoming necessary for change.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Things Move On Without You: Freedom
uncategorised.content: That things move on without you should only give you strength, that you can come in and out at anytime, you owe no responsibility to it. You can be a total unknown to everyone and infiltrate yourself in many worlds, knowing and following only your passion.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Knight of Faith Rises Over Morality
uncategorised.content: The knight of faith rises over the sphere of morality. He renounces the finite to dare reach the infinite he does not know. The knight of faith is the brother of uncertainty. He ventures beyond the shores, he lives this life of ours taking risks for things all he has is faith for. And all that ever went beyond the general from which one embarked on his journey had to be discovered through some leap of faith of some knight. A zero to one work of magic for those in the general to whom this new thing hasn't yet been integrated.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Willpower on the Will to Power
uncategorised.content: your power to will is determined by your willpower on the will to power.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Believe in the Power of Your Reason
uncategorised.content: You shall thus believe harder in the power of your reason, that your reason be so great it is understood and propelled by every living piece of computronium that this world has to offer and in general in your spirit, the power of your power.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Every Hero Must Go Through Their Own Journey
uncategorised.content: All the heros that will be made will have to go through the journey themselves, developing their own structure in many ways probably different. They can't make others understand their way. Thus one alone, yet in parallel with all the heros that there once was, rises above the masses and is unable to give back to them. To even show one has something to give to them

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Life Not Yet Overcome
uncategorised.content: Life has spread itself, it has made itself after and from itself, but still there hasn't lied its overbearing, still remains to be done and undone life, that the overlife may come about.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Virtue as Individuality
uncategorised.content: That perhaps your virtue is your individuality, thus putting yourself in front guide of your ship so you go your way. Everyone is an expert at good and evil, points Nietzsche out, yet there is no overhuman yet. All that is created by humans can likewise be created by yourself.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Let Yourself Be Your Greatest Virtue
uncategorised.content: Let yourself be your great virtue and your great source of virtue. You should be your own greatest project. The overhuman sees in you its virtue. Virtue is not the state but the momentum. The virtue of the champion before he becomes the champion. The virtue is thus best seen naked, when it doesn't come with all that it has produced. Let the virtue guide you to become you. Let the joy of virtue be in itself all you need to keep on building it.

uncategorised.title: Idea/Essay: Coisa de engomadeira
uncategorised.content: "A engomadeira", de José de Almada de Negreiros, é um quadro de 1938, onde, em jeito caricato e metafórico, é criticada a posição na qual as mulheres se podiam encontrar em 1938, embora possa se generalize para os tempos que correm. Observamos uma mulher, torta e desmontada (ombros e anca deslocados relativamente ao corpo), engomando o ferro, numa sala escura, apenas iluminada pela luz que rebenta pela janela,. A cor do vestido perde-se na tonalidade das paredes da sala. Por cima da cabeça, flutuando pelos ares, está um pássaro preso numa sala. A meu ver, a engomadeira é revista como um pássaro que tenta cantar, mas que é ofuscado pelas grossas paredes que o cercam. É este o cenário que abarca a mulher do quadro, símbolo da mulher como entidade ,visto que, assim se depreende, só engoma por obrigação (não transmite satisfação de todo), e por obrigação só engoma, não obstante o rouxinol cantante que talvez tenha dentro de si. É no meio disto, então, que, do meu ponto de vista, surge a luz, bem lá atrás: o mundo lá fora, o desconhecido, o que nunca será conhecido pela engomadeira, porque é engomadeira, e engomadeira será. Considero que esta forma de colocar a luz no quadro acentua o seu cariz crítico. É também uma prisioneira do tempo, porque está presa em coisa de outro tempo, o trabalho doméstico forçado. Desmontada por dentro e por fora, de cabelo caído. Foi, enfim, tão puxada e consumida por um ambiente desgostoso que chega mesmo a adquirir a textura da parede, como se pode ver nos traços de que está cheia, a título de exemplo, a sua cara. Assim, chega-nos a ideia de que a engomadeira passa a ser o ferro de engomar, as paredes, e também a madeira. Ela é o que faz, pelo menos aos olhos da sociedade, embora aquilo que faça não seja o que ela é. Muito pelo contrário: para se lançar luz sobre quem é (em vez de "o que" é), a engomadeira deveria escapar àquela sala quase impenetrável, libertando o rouxinol cantante para fora da janela. Em suma, penso que este quadro visa denunciar a falta de liberdade de algumas mulheres, que são vítimas de um estereótipo velho que ainda resiste, e que, deste modo, são impedidas de se realizar.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Yours Is Yours
uncategorised.content: Not falling pray to one's own story, that one thus shouldn't preach, is in part about accepting the extreme case that all that one did was voluntary and not needed. That all the suffering one put oneself through was voluntary. That all you did it for was for the joy of it, accept this and all other reasons be yours. Giving away, painfully, that your way is no more useful, it was only useful to you in your way. This brings exclusivity. Computational irreducibility in that others can't skip through their journey by knowing yours. Yours is yours. heros don't tell their story. They can put it out there even if it makes them feel better, but there will be no ears.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Own the River
uncategorised.content: You own the river and thus it propels you even further, for you ride your wave and that of the world, for you make the world move with the current that brings you farther. So even if the wills of other's that you worshiped manage to be kept away from your ship the river can still be against you, but there you know it and can fight it. Thus a la descartes one must, beyond truth and into will the world maker, we must reject all thought that isn't clear and correct, all wills that we have not tasted and proven, for one's will to be pure, one has to build it from the ground up. One must accept the nothing of the world to make it fully his own. One must believe in its unreality to make it his own reality.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Seeing the Future Changes You
uncategorised.content: And seeing the future changes you. Seeing the past changes you too. And the present when you come from either of those. Seeing the future allows you to see what survives and what doesn't. What is permanent and what is transitory. Looking at the past changes you. Cause if it is the past then there was someone back there who escaped it for you to be able to be something else entirely. Your actuality isn't in that past. Your origins may scare you, they may confuse you.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Power of Dead Past Moments
uncategorised.content: The power of those dead past moments that come so quick and catch your love of life and arouse your ultimate desire that yet leave traceless and leave you alone at sea. They all make your life the greatest gift. One that even with almost no retribution still is worth the shot.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Moving Forward by Definition
uncategorised.content: And inside a life to move on by definition has to come to the future. So this doesn't mean just people of the past, but you of the past, and once again you always are with a delay, that you reap later what you sow now.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Will Divided: Overhuman and Human
uncategorised.content: That Nietzsche's will is thus divided into the overhuman and the human.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- No Will of Existence
uncategorised.content: That there can't be will of existence, cause those that could will it that they don't exist can't will it. Only wills higher than existence can thus be willed, will to truth and will to power among them. Only those wills to something that one can or cannot have can be willed. Will can only will to win thus.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Becoming the Creator of Worlds
uncategorised.content: I am become life, the creator of worlds. You like a god of gods would want to create a world that is yet so much beyond himself that one may lay back and kneel in admiration. You overhuman shall bring the overuniverse. If you dare you can create beyond all that you have made, beyond yourself, your world. The cycle closes. You are already a god when the world is yours, so overgod must you be to make something even the bigger. Ultimately this world isn't enough for you, this life isn't enough to fill your appetite.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Living Ahead: The Delay
uncategorised.content: The explicit case of living ahead, with this delay is when you've moved on from what you are now doing, already fully into the thing that comes after. It makes you enjoy what is to die, before overcoming it.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Winning the Wills of Others
uncategorised.content: And that winning the will of others is thus what can be won, for non willed things are totally public fair and square. they can't be allocated, deployed, gamed, hacked, yours.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- War Over Peace
uncategorised.content: "war and courage have accomplished more great things than love of one's neighbor" there is no reason to shy away from this. War has accomplished more than peace. War has brought about the best of you, of the warrior. It was never the peaceful times where you got the most. No matter how peaceful this or that is, you know I will find a way to my place to my war. I will find a way to fight, michael jordan style. I will find a way to stop the cuteness and put the heart down.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Undefeated by the Pressure of the Moment II
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions :Once again the pressure came to us, but we are still undefeated, had to get out of training, lost the subway because took too much time finding the pass in the bag, thought the pressure was catching up but after all it was chill, then get home and there take too much time but still chill getting to the subway, about a 5 min margin from sub to train, but the subway gets late, is full, had to force myself in, then it stops at a station for like 5 minutes, because someone went unconscious leaving the subway. I sprint to the train, and it was late and we got the w.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- When Reading Yields Nothing II
uncategorised.content: Just read the whole chapter and didn't get anything.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Easy Ways Out of Reality II
uncategorised.content: There are easy ways out of reality, you can lose it, you can lose grasp of it, hard is to hold all drives still and hold all options open and feel the full power of superposition that your true power implies. Most people would rather collapse their whole into something easier something more graspable by themselves and others, something which can be written, something understandable, something rational, justifiable, not a raw untamed wild beast that goes beyond the projections the mind uses to exercise control, goes beyond the very finite limits tractable to our mind, beyond any language and beyond any program, beyond concepts and conceptions, beyond idea and experience.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Paradoxical Ungratefulness of Fiction
uncategorised.content: The paradoxical ungratefulness of humans beyond their capacity of fiction, that they should be immensely grateful to reality that they can see beyond it, that they can venture far and forward, yet some become salty of their reality not being that which they can see which they haven't brought about.

uncategorised.title: Idea: On Life Affirmation as Practical Course of Action
uncategorised.content: Faced with the reality of the world it is the most useful, the most pragmatic course of action yet much of ideal course of inaction it is too. Its this affirmation of life and the self and the world and the yes saying to all that exists, all that all the more is but a spark, rather a persistent quality, persistent qualities are scarce in a world that at every moment takes from you all that you had that very moment.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Having Seen It All: Light and Free
uncategorised.content: When one has seen it all and one has been beyond the ideal and the real, when one has digested the ugly and the beautiful, one lives light, unafraid of what may come next, for there is nothing that one has been hiding from. There is nothing one has kept in the back of his mind feeding of the attention it doesn't get. There is no surprises, no secret, no cards under the table. One has no worry but to live. Powerful he can be and directive and assertive and directing and precise he can be with his allocation of his power and spirit. Forward he can move at every moment, not ever having to look back. Uncertainty is the terrain of this overhuman that is characterized by the juggling of all contradictions and drives that opposed one another yet through him coexist. Only through him. God of superposition that he handles it all and has none of it truly figured out, is able to withstand that he doesn't have anything figured out, that maybe only at the end does it all come together, yet that his path there can now traverse many dimensions unavailable to those who couldn't resist the growing of the bubble that tightens them up in their own system. That he can find things where others can't. Relations that others can't. Compartmentalization reduces RAM usage but massively lowers potential of output. this is the blessing of dimensionality, as opposed to the curse of dimensionality..

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Conditions for Greatness Are Disadvantageous II
uncategorised.content: Conditions for your most fundamental greatness are obviously disadvantageous, if that greatness is truly the motive.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Your Becoming or Someone Else's Being
uncategorised.content: You choose with whom you cross the river. With your becoming or someone else's being. You embark with your values or someone else's. You are either the master of your ship or you are in someone else's "frota"

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Speaking Many Languages: Everywhere at Home
uncategorised.content: For this freedom of thought and life, speaking many languages is important. Thats why it is important. Everywhere at home.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Smooth with Humans: Leverage Their Multiplicity
uncategorised.content: So if smoothly you want to be with humans you must use them, leverage each perk of their multitude, their difference and individuality, and with anyone of them be

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Climbing as Diversion of the Soul That Wants to Fly
uncategorised.content: That climbing great heights may be a diversion of the soul whose actual goal is to fly.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Fundamentally Dissociate from Groups
uncategorised.content: Fundamentally dissociate from groups. Never see yourself through the light of a group, I am not part of any group, its they not us. Always save at least an extra layer for yourself over the group, because you matter more than the group.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- In Solitude: Free of Mind, Spirit, and Body
uncategorised.content: Here in solitude you can be free of mind and of spirit and of body. You can be truth seeking. You can engage the self, waken the beastly beings underneath, waken the hidden desires, get a better grasp on all of you.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Not Too Attached to Your Humanness
uncategorised.content: That you may not get too attached to your humanness, having no problem in traversing the bridge toward the higher human in you, to never be afraid of your heights. There is more. There is more beyond comprehension. This is common comprehension. There are levels over, there are levels under, and you are unable to see all of the levels. You may see some heights, just know there is much beyond that.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Not Getting Lost in the General
uncategorised.content: One thus doesn't get lost in the general, but one also doesn't lose his moment, for in his mind he can have a substrate of the eternal he so ceases.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Courage to Express Maximally II
uncategorised.content: That one may have the courage to express himself maximally, his telos, beyond the infinite, the unfathomable infinite of the eternal that oversees and for many outshines every movement out of its life, subjugates it into its lowest form.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The True Meaning of the Leap of Faith
uncategorised.content: Here you understand the true meaning of the leap of faith. Its a jump out of a cliff where you don't know if you will be able to fly. You put all you are the finite on the line for something greater, a singularity that one escapes its boundedness, but risks losing it all in the process. Necessary it is for if one still leaves something in land he will still be moved by it, he will still be rooted in the finite. Whole he must go.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Coach-Athlete Relationship at the Highest Level
uncategorised.content: Think of a relation between high level coach and athlete. Khabib and islam. Does khabib sit there and motivate islam? Of course not, it runs so much deeper than that. Islam is as motivated as anyone and khabib and him are on the same page. Khabib can talk to islam at such a level that just one or two words can carry more truth to islam than reading an entire book could. They probably have their own language at this point, not that the alphabet is different, but simply only islam and khabib's turing machines accept that language, if you model dagestan as a universal computer and islam and khabib as finite automata.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Fernando Pessoa: Levels of Thinking
uncategorised.content: Fernando Pessoa: and there are levels to thinking of course. But once you think at a certain level, the deeper the more painful, you connect with all yous that thought that way in the past. You make a bridge over all the time inbetween, in which you did what was irrational, what thinking showed to be meaningless yet that gave you more strength.

uncategorised.title: Idea: What Do You Care What Other_- Backed by God
uncategorised.content: Backed by god. never let it slip to above your head, but believe. you can even have a trust on this branch, one that chaos and butterfly effect has led to, trust this is the best one even tho you haven't seen the others.

uncategorised.title: Synthesis: Coisa De Engomadeira
uncategorised.content:
Title: Coisa De Engomadeira: A Metaphor for Human Existence in the Face of Chaos and Order

Body:

The concept of "Coisa de engomadeira," as depicted by José de Almada Negreiros in his 1938 painting, serves as a poignant metaphor for human existence, particularly for women in the context of 1938 and beyond. The work, rendered in a caricatured and metaphorical style, critiques the position women found themselves in during that era, yet it remains relevant today.

In the painting, a woman, disheveled and out of balance (with shoulders and hips displaced from her body), is seen engrossed in her work—the ironing board serving as both a symbol of domestic labor and a representation of the human condition itself. The room is dimly lit, with only a sliver of light streaming through the window to illuminate the scene. The dress's color blends into the tone of the room's walls, hinting at the blurring of boundaries between the individual and their environment.

This work speaks to the broader philosophical question of whether the method of a priori reasoning is complete, as explored by Gil Jorge in his essay on the subject. The completion of such a method would imply that it is possible to know everything that can be known, yet the mysteries of human existence and relationships suggest otherwise. Furthermore, the concept of 'Alicerce Primordial' highlights the importance of understanding and navigating these complexities to build a just society based on human rights.

In essence, "Coisa de engomadeira" represents the chaotic and contradictory nature of human existence, as well as our ongoing struggle to find order and meaning within it. As we continue to delve into the mysteries of chaos and order, as outlined by Stephen Hawking in his essay on the subject, we are reminded that the search for understanding and self-improvement remains an ongoing journey.

Questions for further exploration: How does the concept of "Coisa de engomadeira" apply to contemporary societal issues? What can we learn from examining the relationship between chaos, order, and human existence throughout history? How can we use these insights to build a more just society?

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- I Believe in Eternity
uncategorised.content: I believe in eternity. I'm a human of eternity. Most of all eternity through moment. The most finite thing, a moment, has such infinite value that I equate it to eternity.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Self-Overcoming
uncategorised.content: Self overcoming, I am to be overcome, the human is something that is to be overcome.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- What You Do Echoes in Eternity
uncategorised.content: This idea that what you do in life echoes in eternity allows you to have faith on something other, allows you to cease eternity through means of maximizing everything but eternity and the lies of the other worlds, you go for this very life.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- If You Can Smell Eternity
uncategorised.content: If you can smell eternity, then you love the world enough so as to believe in it, so as to look for it, and you are ready for eternal recurrence, the eternal blessing, which some still believe is a curse, the eternal love with all and with all love, as one eternal life and world.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Shadow of the Overhuman
uncategorised.content: That we are still a shadow of the overhuman. A projection. A collapse. A reduction in dimension. In volume. A reduction. Harnessing the power of our higher fuller selves on our way to self actualization and self overcoming. and yet the overhuman is inasmuch the shadow of us. Its non expression comes as our repression. It is our shadow that we fear manifest. Its in there somewhere in the depths of our minds those forces that could elevate us over and beyond, after, like Zarathustra, undergoing. Unleashing the dormant part of ourselves to being the most alive

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Enslaved by Everything to Be Enslaved by Nothing
uncategorised.content: So the way out of slavery that we are all slaves to something is in the way also of being enslaved by everything so that you can no longer be enslaved by anything, so that the things that can enslave you cannot any longer. Join this to the freedom from it that you choose what enslaves you, and you climb the ladder once more.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Much Evil Still to Come
uncategorised.content: That much evil is still to come, that what is now considered evil is recent at times and that the fear of being evil for some people doesn't rule out greatness. That fear shouldn't mark evil.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Power as the Bestowing Virtue
uncategorised.content: Power it is the bestowing virtue. Seeking power the way of elevation will to power. My virtue. Nietzsche preaches the use of this power of virtue into the real, not letting this virtue get shattered by the unreality of the eternal, rather have it very present your virtue, be it very present.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Evil as Incubator of Greatness
uncategorised.content: Don't underestimate the power of evil to hatch greatness within someone. In fact the fastest way to greatness may just be through evil. The long way round through good is the hardest and most praiseworthy way. You should know both and choose the good one, only then it is a good path, that you explicitly reject evil. Being afraid of it will only put you at a disadvantage that you don't know it, that you have an escape route, an escape goat, that even if you lay all in the line there is still the possibility that through the path you didn't know you lost. No, have all the cards in front of you so you can be assured and firm on the piece that you gave it all.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Will to Power Cannot Be Weakened by Revenge on Time
uncategorised.content: Will to power cannot be weakened because of its revenge on time. So we have to will backwards, or forget it totally.

uncategorised.content: You gotta overcome the world to overcome it. Overcome has two meanings that the language till now driven by the thought of the people wasn't considerate and strong enough to distinguish. Overcome in the aspect of overcoming, as in working through it, to get to the place of overcoming that comes after when you precisely don't work through it.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Battle of Powers Within
uncategorised.content: there is always a battle of powers within, Nietzsche says that the ultimate self overpowering should be goodness. That it rises above all causes all things considered. now goodness without power for evil is not as real, is not tested in battle, can easily crumble under the temptation to evil when it arises.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Risks Harder When Comfortable

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Shatter Good and Evil, Rebuild Anew

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Accepting the Voluntariness of Suffering

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Godlike Desires
uncategorised.content: Being godlike starts with having godlike desires.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Great Ambitions Find Others' Virtues Small
uncategorised.content: You that have great ambitions find the virtues of others ever smaller, find joy in seeing them content, that they can live with small virtues, that they can leave this earth without knowing a lot of things, that they can forever live in this earth and not seek escape. That they can make of the bit they are enough. You are glad that there are such people, you are glad people that don't know what you know can still have something going for them. You find peace in knowing you could never be them, and they could never be you, and you support them in their direction, and they in yours, even if no one understands each way.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Priests as Victims of Delusion
uncategorised.content: The picture here painted by Nietzsche is that priests are victims of delusion. They filled the gaps their spirit had with God, thus becoming a simulacrum of a good soul, whose base crumbles at touch. Lackless they think themselves to be, yet lackful, via unaddressing, they are if they are wrong. They put themselves through pain, cause pain is the most real feeling, to start to believe in their own narrative, they thus invest and dive head on to their voluntary movement, and sometimes may forget that it is a voluntariness, that in the worst case there was nothing to be gained by that undergoing. It is in one's interest of maximizing life that one believes that each moment should be maximized, that one owes nothing to anyone or any story. There is no memory. We live a local life. The moment is all there is. Thus at any moment one can be lived anew. One can totally change what one is. Don't let yourself be slave of your past plans, of what you thought back then or what someone else did. If you are so stuck in the framework of your church, think that the god you preach would beyond all have wanted you to maximize your short stay at his hotel.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Knight of Faith Needs No Reason
uncategorised.content: The knight of faith can act out of no reason apparent. He doesn't need one. While others need to see ahead, he doesn't. While others need certification of success, while others need approval and guarantee of heroic status for a sacrifice, he doesn't, he is intrinsic and pure in his action, he doesn't need to place expectations, he can act out of freedom And do the unimaginable in the sense that one sees no reason for it to do the unimaginable in the sense that no one else knows how he could do it. First no one knows how he can do something, for there is no reason for it, then they don't know how he did something, that whose greatness they think they cannot taste. For our comprehension of anything is too little beyond the absurd of the world, and with so little knowledge of what happens only doing what is rational, only experimenting what makes sense limits you to what has already been approved and what is known, which again is very little. Further one needs absolutely nothing to do the greatest of things, he can do it out of spite and as naturally as one blinks an eye. He needs no narratives, no frameworks, no motivations, he can become the master of the smallest and biggest craft. He is not limited by his past. He lives the present, the all too absurd. That is absurd.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Only After Shattering: Highest Good and Worst Evil
uncategorised.content: Only then after shattering all good and evil do you have the possibility for the highest good and also the worst evil. No great evil was ever put forth that didn't come from within. Yet this journey must be trespassed into he who seeks the greatest good. He must confront and say no to the evil he meets along the way.

There has to be a disruptor of the current world for it to feel strength to change. This is a meta principle behind Newton's second law and others. The future never just happens by itself, it never arrives. Those that built it were those that lived in it already, and for them it was not the future, it was just their present.

uncategorised.title: Idea: locating and isolating collective intelligence

EVolution, not on the level of the individual but on the level of the collective, diffeente collectievs woulda produced different structures and only this collective intelligence was chosen, many were tried. the gene may be the fundamental unit of evolution, but not the only one, not the maximum expression of evolution which thus come sin all scales.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Physics Informing Neural Networks
uncategorised.content: just like there is physics informed neural networks I propose there are physics informing neural networks, where either you give the freedom of the model to get supraphysical predictions that yield better results and then perhaps just like we build in the autograd things for the model to have a virtual physical loss we could use those objects for the model to express it's findings in the form of known mathematical functions and not just the blackbox NN function. Perhaps better we could build them in pair, one trying to inform as much as possible while the other is trying to be informed as much as possible in a inimax game. this thing up here takes into account that getting zero physical loss may not be optimal, or getting just the loss associated to uncertainty in the experiment, it is constrained optimization so it can constrain us if we are not careful about it's application the thing about pinss and other methods, is they leverage that thing of the infinites not existing and thus all contibutions being finite. Namely, if you only care about the data, through the hyperparameter in pareto fronts multi objective loss functions, then you will overfit and not get infomration out of the NN, if you only use physics, through again making that coefficient go to inf you wont't get any information out of the NN because you are only attacking the data with physics. So the optimal has to be somewhere finite in between with a finite coefficient for both losses. Now these pareto fronts decompose physics from data, but we can probably further decompose the physics loss, becasue this way we only reap the rewards of the explotatory space along two axis, but we can make this more multidimensiona, and thus jhave new literal curves of attack. Right, not all physics is worth the same for our experiments or is established in the same way, we have different uncertainties about different pjhysis, so we shoudln't impose that prior on the Loss.

uncategorised.content:
to chat gpt:

in the gradient descent algorithm I was wondering what would be the most efficient learning rate. What I got to, and want you opinion on, is that thinking of the step after getting the gradient vector, what fundamentally will happen, in the limit you go with super small learning rate, is you will trace out the path descending on the direction of largest decrease until that changes. So the most efificnet learning path would be, in terms of steps, to go down as far as possible as loing as the direction in which you are going down aligns with the opposite of gradient, and right there change to the next. The minorant on the number of steps would be the number of direction changes. Now of course for continuous functions directions can change just a bit, so we'd have to be guaranteed that the small deviations on the path, if there are any, and in general there are, dont take us away from the next "milestone" per say. So if you have to fix a step then it would be that which minimizes the aggregate of these steps. For example the smallest of them, as in the smallest distance between points where gradient significantly changes. That is an example, it doesnt generalize as the best procedure for all cases but is a start

uncategorised.title: Idea: persepheus's world

Computer virus, corrupted files, that by stochasticity change themselves, like mutations. Everythibg is changing. Its that thing of your molecules are renewed, that is, you are made of a new set of molecules on average after some time. So what you build informs you of what built it. By trying to design a language do you get the concepts that evolution ran through, tho evolution wasnt doing it on purpose. By trying to build something humans already built do you understand the evolution in them to build that and the evolution of which they learned by building the thing, for example an airplane via birds. Now just like that set of molecules humans are always being substituted in this world. The point is there is nothing ever permament, what you do now has some retrocausality on what was there before it. Thats how your file system, your system, is changed. What happens now affects your view on what was there before.

Of course superintelligent AI would rapidly build things of its own kind, but the next level is harder.

Now if in this space there is this much to grab beyind the low hanging fruit, just imagine how good an AI can get at this. Reverse engineering of programs is important, reverse engineering of AI, and with this reverse engineering of humans and thoughts. But now im trying to reverse engineer this guy's methods and implications for the world model we have of the mind. Or maybe this oz pearlman stuff is really just more bulshit than it seems. There is some real skill but perhaps he doesnt have the full skill, yet I think its possible to have the full skill he claims to have So this was before I discovered the whole thing, after that I developed the whole theory, so this was when I thought he had figured some free will defying stuff

uncategorised.title: Idea: AI-human

The thing is the brain is not even interpretable, as in we dont know enough of its architecture and fucntioning to play the mechanistic interpretability game.

uncategorised.title: Idea: the bet
uncategorised.content: In training AI models we are betting that there is information to be gained in a certain task, certain hidden variables that make the latent space rich in structure and that allow great insight. Or else we wont gain anything out of them. We effectively have not physics informed models but informed models about whatever task. That information we have allows us to get a glimpse into higher structures that we think the model can appropriate itself of when riding the high dimensional (for example) spaces we put it through.

uncategorised.title: Idea: higher signal to noise ratio in scaling laws

Thus a kind of recursion definition of intelligence comes through: lossless compression not of information but of the information processing system itself.

uncategorised.title: Idea: optimization process for recommendation

Now when it comes to searching content in the world, through youtube for example, the algorithm doesnt seem to be good enough to escape this behaviour of betting on randomness, it is better than evolution in this sense but worse than a gradient descent of sorts, it takes time giving you what you want. So I had a topic that I wanted to dive into some long time ago, and only today did it give me something resembling it. Of course perhaps I didnt search well enough, and there isnt the exact thing i was after, and the algorithm didnt recommend to me well enough.

For a lot of things people dont dare go deep enough for something to be deeply rooted, and so they actually resort and come back and find confort in equilibrium, not improving It could be argued that a life without improving is one devoid of time, but still freedom prevails, and this can only be true and say a lot about those who say it, not of life itself Fake it until you make it, but it turns out you cant fake it. Either you believe or you dont, do or do not, there is no try Hit the target no one sees. Hit the target no one knows exist. If you point to the same place you get a constant function. You gotta intersect the future. If you always move where the target moved last iteration you are always one step behind it.

uncategorised.title: Idea: neurosymbolic
uncategorised.content: Perhaps combining symbolic knowledge with the learned implicit knowledge that deep learning excels at gives us a revolution. Perhaps the brain combines them both in a way that one reinforces the other. The brain had millions and millions of years of evolution, and we think its way of updating is random in mutations, but perhaps it is not, not sure. The thing is in some amount of years way less than millions we can reconstruct a similar capability as the brain. If mutations are really random, SGD is way more efficoent, and so in the search problem of finding this intelligence solution we can be way more efficient than evolution searching the space for more time. A way of merging both paradigms is if somehow the symbolic logic knowledge can be extracted or derived from the latent world model space, through interpretability. So that you have both a distributed hierarchically compositional structure where infrmation flows but also centralization in that you can get specific facts out of it, as in partitoning the space, so that we dont depend on the super complex manifold for everything and we can actually work with smaller specific things.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- War of Ideas
uncategorised.content: War of ideas. That the other lover of ideas love us from the ground up, yet are also our own worst enemy. That in the name of keeping this war alive you should love from the ground up your position, yet seek your worst enemy. Learn the most. Make it a mess of a thing of a ramble of ideas competing for your attention, not uniform. Warrior no soldier. A whole army moving freely you are my friend.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- War as the Way of the Warrior
uncategorised.content: In order to seek new wars of ideas, new wars of concepts and ways of being I add ; one loves times of peace, but the short lived, not the long. Seek greater enemies and diversify. You will increase your level. You are the warrior the more wars you put yourself, the more you fight through. Nietzsche says it is war that makes causes and not causes that make wars. Every hope to become rigorous belief must be battle tested, must be forged in the midst of wars with everything it opposes, and everything you already know and are, so that its pure form may be after compression, at last distilled into you, however little of substance it had in the first place. You must be battle tested to be immovable out there. You must have crossed the 7 layers of hell and come back to be still in soul, unbreakable in spirit. Let victory, not rest be your peace. Let not peace wander around too long. In fact victory lasts not very long at all. War is the way the lifestyle of the warrior. Embracing silent war, silent wins. That perhaps it takes everything out of you to keep the war, to get the wins, and even then not moving one bit to the idea of going again. Needing it. Thriving off it. Even if you are the only one who can hear its sounds, even if you're the only one who loves, who knows, who understands, who cares, who sees. Be him who seizes.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Enemies Within, Enemies That Break You Anew
uncategorised.content: That yet your enemies are within you, part of you, symbiotic. Thus they break you into something new. That you should in a sense enjoy the ride as you have it, ride on what's going for you, for war and enemies will eventually bring about another. And so obedience to your command your twinning thought, applying and raising its hand, touring it around your life. Not here for a long time, here for a great time.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Human to Be Overcome
uncategorised.content: "The human is something that is to be overcome" the whole message of the book. It seems hard to overcome the human as a human, but it is in me to get it done. I as of now gaze at the fire, was it invented or discovered? My wise bit, my uncle, said it was captured, seen in nature and tamed. This form of life made totally functional, constricted. Only allowed to burn a certain much, that is the most annoying. Having to work but not being able to give it your best. No warrior wants to live long or be spared. One wants a great war, may the best thought come out, may one change for the better, and may peace be short lived. But what is it else that hasn't been captured by human, tamed. Now the overhuman shall tame the human, tame all that's human, all too human, this is a way I see to unlock the next chapter in our experience. Destroy it all the alike and rise the new. so that the overhuman isn't contaminated by human foundations, tho it builds on 'em.

One can no longer point blame or bear responsibility, one can no longer own achievement, a giant cloud of mess submerged into the supremacy of the state, stealer of all that was something. Nietzsche even goes further in suggesting the going back to the old ways when one could place all power and good and evil in one person. Thus there are too many he says.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Mud on the Throne

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: On Irreplicable Essence

But they can't make the sauce." this idea that it is very clear to see what makes things work, yet being unable to get the ingredients. Thing that can't be bought. The fiber that only you have, can't be taken from you (it's yours) and can't be taken away (it's only yours). Stuff that is truly valuable, beyond any clothing and surface one puts over it. there is this great aspect of seeing someone you know do something great you didn't know they could do. Like they not telling you and then you discovering independently they did something. That is essence.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Solitude, the Highlight Era, and the Overhuman
uncategorised.content: That in solitude and from the exterior of the state may the overhuman rise and take over the mere human. the era of the highlight, that today things amount to nothing unless a show is made out of them, Nietzsche says. Image becomes an ever more important commodity, a necessary and sufficient medium of truth, of belief, of idea. Truly ever more things you did in your life are more irrelevant if they weren't filmed. And yet we that in this generation passed through both scenarios have still this privacy to us, that no one knows what we've been doing all our lives, it gives so much space to achieve so much without anyone knowing. I think we shouldn't neglect the brain drain that happens right inside our homes, with little children future owners of mankind watching tv shows that at times bless nothing onto them. Even worse for old people, that are allowed watching nothing binge-watched shows that drain life away. They in reality show that one doesn't need meaning to live, as the discussion of Camus made me think. One can just pass along not bothering much. When death becomes widely recognized as more avoidable I wonder what will be done to these people. Or to these shows rather.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Creators of Values vs Actors of the Show
uncategorised.content: Nietzsche says the way of the world is that it revolves around the creators of new values, but people revolve around the play actors and the show.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- On the Dilution of Authority and Values
uncategorised.content: There is a real sense in which the dilution of authority, responsibility, into the collective being, brings about a certain confusion as to the problems you face, and honorable and more generally value driven people would abstain from playing this game. They'd rather die in battle than live with the mess of modern problems of which they have no clarity. They don't want to live for free if that means giving away their individual values. Thus one sacrifices even his life, thus one seeks the clear rules of into the wild a la Kaczynski.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Becoming What You Sought to Destroy
uncategorised.content: This thing that adults and cooler teenagers who are living their lives to the fullest get to stay up till late, doing cool people stuff, this wave is now through me, and I am reaching the end of the ride. I confessed not to become this, yet see myself become the thing I sought to destroy, behold, now I present to you the overhuman, the overme. Coming back to truths stronger.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Natural, After Taming
uncategorised.content: Being a natural, and following nature are worthy of admiration. The perfect innocence of senses, after they were deadened and taken into your control, and then by immense control did you give yourself to free them. After taming all conquers of yours, letting them flow their new yours given way.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Freedom from Desire and the Champion's Ease
uncategorised.content: Becoming free from them gives you this chill, not replicable by those who visually are holding tension, after battling out with their will, whether about eating that cheesecake, whether to get on studying, see they have pressure on themselves to work, to do what they are supposed to do. You? You just know wholeheartedly you will. You have gone through all those battles, you are now freed from desire. It's refreshing too for people to see champions that seem to take stuff so lightly and value them so much.

uncategorised.title: Idea: On Solitude and the Inner Dialogue
uncategorised.content: For the solitary one person around is too many, Nietzsche says, that it prevents the two of the solitary, him and his mind, to take the moment into greater depths. Thus I say company is enemy of truth. If right now what you wish is truth, all it takes and it takes all, is you alone. To be able to journey within into depths you are afraid to show another. There is no single one that knows you beyond the depths you are willing to go if you are alone, or rather with anyone you are not willing to go beyond certain depths. Truly being alone, that means being with nobody, not talking to Nietzsche, or who you are talking to in some of your free time, not having the company of society's mass produced memes. Truly yourself. Here can you search the big questions, and can you be free to do so. How much can you do that you can't do while with others? How many conversations there are no ears for in this world except your mind. How many places can you go only you comprehend. In essence how many limits the world places on your mind, that is what can be overcome as you stand with yourself. How much can you discover beyond the usual field of play you've been bound to. What would you actually do were you handed solitude for some amount of time? Those are some interesting questions. What voices are being muted by each bounding factor. What thoughts are better vocalized and more eloquently expressed when you are by yourself? This one particularly hits home for me. I'm much better able to produce ideas by writing or thinking by myself than when asked from people with people

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- At Least Be My Enemy
uncategorised.content: At least be my enemy if you can't be my friend, says Nietzsche in somewhat these words. If no one is your enemy then you perhaps don't really matter, or don't do something big. Heard this too from Andrew Tate, and from polarizability in general, people want to see your action, whether they are friends and want to see you rise or enemies and want to see you crumble. There is of course bullshit and stupidity in Andrew Tate, but there is also things to be taken, value to be taken by going where others don't dare perhaps for the deprecation of those around them. Perhaps being dangerous and choosing to work as a team is a build of solid friendship. Making your friendship valuable through mutual knowing of each others capabilities to end it.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Friends as Mirrors of What to Overcome
uncategorised.content: Nietzsche here perhaps insinuating that in your friends you see you that must be overcome. Your friend show you how you must improve, for you see in them what you look like and what you have to improve.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Good and Evil as Signs of Will to Power
uncategorised.content: Nietzsche seems to imply that everyone's good and evil tells us about their overcomings and their will to power.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Tablet of Good and Evil as Prediction Tool
uncategorised.content: Perhaps obvious but never by me said that this tablet of good and evil in every person which dress their will to power is the single most valuable thing in understanding someone and predict them.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Solitude as All You Need
uncategorised.content: Perhaps the straddled principle across these lately ideas, that solitude is all you should ever need. You can live with you and your cause. More than living humans, loving causes he preaches. You love in the other what you envy he says. Be yourself a cause and thus have the highest love for yourself. I am the cause. I am the revolution. If you can't endure being with yourself, you are doomed to keep searching and lurking and looting and looking. What you look to find you should bring about from yourself. You should create that person you love talking to, and the one who does things the way you love. Your perception is your perception not others'

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- On Knowing Your Power
uncategorised.content: That talking contrary to what you don't know is a greater lie than contrary to what you know. This Nietzsche says. for in the first one you fool yourself, in the latter you betray yourself. You don't yet see what you are, what you will be, the extent of your empire without limits, so talking about it as if you know it is failing oneself. Tens de conhecer o teu poder. What a shame if you get out of this place without knowing your true power, perhaps because you were afraid to unleash it, perhaps you let it slip. But not coming to see your final form, whether physical, which Socrates pointed out, whether spiritually mentally lifely, is failing yourself. Perhaps one of the big questions is what can you be.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Individuality Before the Group
uncategorised.content: One should then realize this before handing oneself to the neighbor. Not letting your individuality get faded to the group, that you be letting go of control, but rather augmenting it through it.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Loving Yourself: Polishing the Vision
uncategorised.content: Loving yourself becomes much about polishing and cleaning the dust off your vision, always having it fresh, embracing the moment in the light of the overhuman presence you seek to realize.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Being the Strength, Not Just Having It
uncategorised.content: Not just having a strength, not just having a right, not just having a cause and having a why, but being the strength and the right, and the cause and the why.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Climb Past, Then Fly
uncategorised.content: Being able to climb past, but then fly.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Building the Impregnable Identity
uncategorised.content: Again the process of rebuilding oneself. To build the most impregnable identity, unshakable force of nature within you, you can't wait for it to get destroyed out there. You battle test it, you put your beliefs and wills out there through the roughest conditions, you bombard until only the strongest survive, until the most solid foundations let themselves out to be seen. You dress down all into the bare body which you carry with you into the next battle. Too much weight wears you, you must stick with the simplest yet most absolute bases before you start building on top. You thus have the most high density of quality robust trustworthy alignment within. Your troops, absolutely loyal to you. You try to kill these things which you have on your side, yet to strengthen the deserved few.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Self-Love and the Creation Beyond the Self
uncategorised.content: Love of yourself makes you despise yourself in going for the creation beyond yourself, makes you perish. Becoming the overhuman is being the overhuman perhaps.

uncategorised.title: Idea: On Silence, Frame Control, and True Questions
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: it is tendency to think that that thing which we lack so much, which I lack so much, which is keeping in mind the long run in the now, having that greatness instinct even when you are doing the most dull thing, that truthness that you forget and substitute thus for lesser things, thus you think you have nothing to do, when you have very much the very opposite. This you think is solved by throwing in stuff to the mind, like music, motivational videos or whatever, when in reality it is found in silence. Truth is better cultivated alone and alone of the rest. Doing nothing for 2 hours may bring back the truth you once recognized. It can furthermore make you see things your body and mind are perhaps trying to say to you of a long time, that yet didn't go through all the noise, couldn't make it to the surface amidst all the pressure that was put on the moment. More is less. The force builds in you clarity. You have a real question, and don't know the answer? You have a dilemma? Sit in silence and the answers will be clear. A la antiga a la kung fu panda, most of the training and time spent by the warrior is reflecting, looking at the water and seeing it look back. Most of the time is spent in the confinement of your mind, in the light of your shadow, finding yourself. The show that others see is in scope very limited to all you've blessed. It is only the very top of the iceberg that others can see, that others can understand. Your job is to make this blackbox of a thing come to life, take all that only you can understand all that's puzzling the self and figure it all out, all, and only you can, and make it come true in what is seen by others. people then ask why in movies they have such assuredness, why they do it like in movies, natural unwavering faith in their outcome. True main character stuff, that you go your way and your way is the way. But there it is they know damn better than others the world they want to be, and they make it, and they make others live in it. The stronger the frame the more likely it becomes everyone's frame. The more truthness and suredness the frame carries, the stronger it gets, The more undeniable, talk about frame control in the life man. this is what they have. What they hold. So much power is in the frame. I will, the masters of frame know. those who have learned to live without reality are the ones who come to find their reality and make it. Those who tune to the deeper frequencies of thought lower levels of questions. This way is not about feeling moving, but about finding the right direction to move to, then go for it. Finding the worthy opponents, the worthy bridges of overcoming, the worthy flags in top of the mountains, into the overhuman. There are few questions that you must answer in your life, most of people spend life, not enjoy it, actually spend it without facing the questions, perhaps because just off the top of their head they don't see clearly the answer, and they have no interest in seeking deeper. Life is mostly about getting away from noise and finding the gem in the sea. Because its huge, this is the way to go. Quality of decisions. Quality of output into the true great questions

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Sensing Uncomprehended Strength
uncategorised.content: Nietzsche, that there is such a thing as sensing strength but not being able to comprehend it. I feel like this we fear, when we sense strength and we comprehend it after, it diminishes it. We don't fear our place in the will to power wheel. Our ego can sleep rested. But if we see strength where we can't understand it. Then we run, then we either deal with it, and let it become our strength or we deny it, we push it further down, slimming down yet expanding the bubble size of the cookie monster. It is power thus to have unseen strength, to have uncomprehended strength. dude why people admit they are tired. This is a nonsense I cannot tolerate by hearing and not writing no more. Like what. Unbelievable few understand this. Actually ridiculously unbelievable, and perhaps it is children who better grasp the concept. I don't see a world where it making sense. But yeah back on topic,

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Undefeated by the Pressure of the Moment
uncategorised.content: Once again the pressure came, but we are still undefeated, had to get out of training, lost the subway because took too much time finding the pass in the bag, thought the pressure was catching up but after all it was chill, then get home and there take too much time but still chill getting to the subway, about a 5 min margin from sub to train, but the subway gets late, is full, had to force myself in, then it stops at a station for like 5 minutes, because someone went unconscious leaving the subway. I sprint to the train, and it was late and we got the w.

uncategorised.title: Idea: On Small Worries and the Meritocracy of Competence
uncategorised.content: still quotes and questions: it is quite pathetic too that small worries take over the lives of people. That the more, people let themselves be controlled and submitted by impulses small little impulses. Like hunger. Chill, I know I'll eat when I get home, so this signal my body is sending is to be ignored. Don't let it stop you. Have control over, and now you are free to fly. Now you can focus on the real bigger things that can throw you off. Now you can come back and join that internal locus of control that you have. That deep self that you know you can't avoid, now you can again connect with him and get aligned. fame alone isn't something one wants. It is only constricting. If there was such a thing as just being famous, the hell out with it. You couldn't go by any way, seas of people would swarm you, you'd have the private means you may say, but that is not fame, money we associate with fame, yet distinct they remain. Power we associate with fame, goodness of being, skill, competence, no. the brutal meritocracy of competence Tate I heard say he believes in, and the hell it is true. The hell it is true. It gives the absolute most power and control to us, thus we believe it thus its true, it's the biggest bang for buck belief, it favours you the most, its a fixed point. Investing in your self type of belief.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Living Ahead of Your Time
uncategorised.content: Sometimes its a matter of being young enough to comprehend strength. To see strength and opportunity different from those too old living ahead of your time. This is a hard of a thing. To see what is going on now and be able to know it will be so futile in the future, the way we do things now, our time, my friend, will all be replaced and seen as dull and slow and dumb. And to picture yourself there at the future looking back on the way we did things, n thats disconcerting Like looking at the sound this train makes. I can go through it, doesn't bother me one bit. But somewhere out there in the future is absolute seamless transport, one that extends what this train already does so well for me and allows me, after developing the necessary strength, to be zoned out as if not travelling. To me it is the exact same being here or being at home at the table reading or being at the library reading. Equalizer. Your strength as weapon makes equalizers. But yeah one day rather than this for most displeaserous sound there will be a sound that activates productivity and happiness and meaning all at once, while being able to do what you want and not just remain seated. Distance will no longer be a factor. Time too in this constrict sense that it won't matter to you how much time a trip takes to get there. But still travelling in time will yield losses. you still will lose time by moving forward in time. most can't even live in the moment let alone be present in the future.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Men in the Matrix
uncategorised.content: Quite saddening too to look at grown ass men still in the matrix.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Fluidity of Movement and Unfazedness
uncategorised.content: Remember, peace of mind brings fluidity of movement. Have it sorted out, know the direction and achieve peace through low level thinking. and I'm telling you, if the sound of the subway causes you anger, if you can't take that hit, if hunger makes you lose intention and volition, then my man you are not even playing at the right game yet. You still are battling against yourself. First align yourself, then make the world align to you. And I was guilty of that at some point, by letting small losses that don't matter take me down and make me not understand that I have to be the best, I am. If you let anything external get to you, fix that. Nothing can stop me I'm all the way up. Thus one develops this peace of being with everything external, an unfazedness regarding everything it may bring. You are unreactive to all the fake battles it suggests to you. You know what the real battles are, you know when you should panic and not. The naturality of the cat, unfazed to everything yet knows when its time to go ham. Not afraid of the dark, the last to move, but the first to move the fastest when given enough evidence, the first to get out. Luck takes work. Takes preparation. What stoicism looks like when it isn't covered by all the media spam wording and connotation and glamour vision. Eventually you become virtually undefeatable, there is nothing outside of you that can hurt you. Comfort becomes a luxury, and it can't pollute your heart. In these moments you've seen you climbed, and despite also doing a lot of bullshit, you climbed, this gives you a certainty that you will climb so much more. I am Inevitable. Perhaps because one gets that extra push after seeing others give up. Seeing others getting frustrated gives you energy. Seeing others give up when I ran cross country and endurance events, seeing I won, that gave such an extra push. And a big fat one'- sleepiness. This one is a motherfucker, I lost control on it sometimes

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Freedom of Not Giving a Damn
uncategorised.content: Its above all a peace and rest as in the opposite of unrest to not give a damn what others think and especially not caring if they recognize your worth. Short story, they won't period. But not giving a f about that allows you to win so much more, you are not dependent on that vision that others have of you. It lets you keep moving forward through island and sea, through storm and sunset, through hell and paradise and back. all of a sudden you come back to respecting yourself so much more and valuing your time so much more. being able to vibe to a music with no headphones and through the sound of the train.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Accepting the Passage of Time
uncategorised.content: Further accept the passage of time. Here in the train I haven't checked time in a minute, I have no clue, and I'd rather keep it that way. Time can't work against you, rather it works for you. I have accepted staying here forever and just doing this. One must imagine Sisyphus happy. Don't even know if I'm travelling forwards or backwards

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Endurance and Repetitive Motions
uncategorised.content: And man I genuinely believe I could easily get through that chinese torture of the perpetuous drop of water, I think I'd just be chilling. But there is such a thing as going crazy over these unusual repetitive motions, your brain can actually get freaked out. I think at least I have more endurance in this aspect than most.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Building Yourself Before Overcoming
uncategorised.content: "Over and beyond yourself shall you build. But first you must be built yourself." to prolong and accept as if willing to stop all your life for you, through means of children, asks of you that you have yourself dominated. Now you have accountability, now you can't afford mistakes. All that is to be done is done and all is said too. Are you ready to call it? Well don't if its going to be you and your child against the world, especially if it is against parts of you that you are fighting with. "not only onward shall you propagate onto, but upward!". Overcoming oneself before so then you can reach farther. The higher the leaves are dropped from the tree you have grown to love, the farther they reach, the farther you see.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Surprise Effect of Hidden Knowledge
uncategorised.content: What I was saying about you not giving a damn what others think of you and so not trying to show you know, being content with only you understanding yourself and your worth. This it brings the surprise effect when you actually are asked for the opportunity to show your knowledge in a certain specialty of yours. Like me here and there actually getting excited talking about training or whatever to others.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- On Free Death
uncategorised.content: On free death is the title if you allow your death to come free, my friend you're not. And you pay the price on this loss of control. it's as if a basketball player didn't retire but rather wait for the day where his knees fell off. We like to mark ends to things, except our life. Or ending a movie or a podcast when the battery of the camera died out.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Relative Aging of Spirit and Body
uncategorised.content: The interplay of staying young till late yet aging through some of the victories and truths of youth. Changing in body but remaining in spirit. Changing in dress but staying in body. Nietzsche says in some the heart ages in others the spirit. And this is one hell of a truth people don't take into account, the aging process of each thing that makes one up. Bryan johnson has unlocked the relative aging of all cells, but one ought to go further and see how certain jokes are relative to thoughts relative to how your maturity ages versus how your fashion ages and how your face ages and how your physical condition ages and how your spirit and beliefs age. you want to evolve, not age, for as long as possible. Never in final form. The natural tendency is alignment of all ages, it's a stable equilibrium. If your spirit is younger than your body, you might go a little too harsh doing sport with your son and end up on the sidelines, effectively aging your body. This perhaps an argument for generality entity, being an all purpose agent. Attacking everything. This I know and do and few do and know.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Preserving the Youth of the Spirit
uncategorised.content: I think its way closer than everyone thinks in terms of what you can preserve young, people think spirit is the only one and still lose it

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Longevity and the Late Bloomer
uncategorised.content: Understand too that if you are going to have more longevity, you are going to be a late bloomer, all will be increasing the distance to you until age starts working against them. It's a long term game. The most ripe fruit takes the most time being prepped.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- A Life Affirming Death
uncategorised.content: Nietzsche paints the picture that your dying should be that of a life affirming being. Your energy should glow into love of the earthly and human. Free for and free from dying. Do not waste your death, and that means make people ripe from of your life. May your dying pass on the value of your living to others. May you thus let space for life to be lived, that life that you brought about. Lead the life, and die for the students to live theirs. A leader must then give space to his followers so they are their own followers.
