uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Value of Uselessness and Immortality
uncategorised.content: That the highest value is conferred to gold for its scarcity, shine and uselessness. By the last one can't measure its value, it is valueless and thereby can be given any value. It is visible by everybody, and few can have it. So the most valuable thing is what everyone sees, what no one can't have, and is useful. But this only confers value. One can define value through uselessness. Immortality confirms itself as the highest value thing if it was wrapped into an object like figure. Control of time. Of the Universe. What would be the gold of the Universe then, for all worlds out there. Perhaps the inside of a black hole? No for it can't be seen. Dark matter isn't luminous enough and perhaps can be useful. Perhaps all useless things are much less known because of that, and so its hard to even name one.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: On Evolution and Competition
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions think of someone you know and see their evolution, and do not reject that they've changed, do not regret that they've gotten severely better. See the argument there is to make that they are winning in life against you. Confront that possibility for everyone, as if you are playing by yourself against the world. And the battle never ends. Don't think just because you think you won back then with something that you have the right to not maintain and improve your situation. The fairness of life comes in the absoluteness of the moment, the inexistence of anything beyond that. The past is only your servant, any win either propels you forward or else does nothing.

uncategorised.title: Idea: The Bestowing Virtue and Transcending Levels
uncategorised.content: The bestowing virtue is an elevation over and beyond. A conquest of the world and yourself, having battled it out, having been through it all, you emerge through the clouds not to be bothered again by those opponents you defeated and took as one of your own. One bridges to the overhuman through expansion of the human all too human. The human is something that is to be overcome. One doesn't progress the quality of life by playing in ever more fields, but by playing in higher fields. By transcending the levels.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- AI, Memory, and the Death of the Internet
uncategorised.content: As the internet dissolves into LLMs, into AI, in its search and generate information capacity, those same AIs will have less data to pull from, so more important will become the data that they get from our conversations and interactions with those ais. Suddenly context length can be greater, it no longer suffices to give a good answer, one ought to get a good answer for one's specific situation. So all the context is our previous conversations, not just what we say. It will engulf human behaviour thus, with memory he shifts on the spectrum from writing knowledge to write us. Finally one can look at the death of internet through mediation for AIs. Barely any service will be better done with humans than AI. Quora already has the answer of POE ahead of people's answers. Still we take this bet, its a self generating thing, we bet that our generation and production that feeds the models will help us produce more

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: On the Duality of Speed and Depth
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions- I have these two strong inclinations that yet seem very exclusive to each other. One the efficiency ultra high bandwidth maximizing the speed of my life and consuming more information being exposed to more through information than anyone out there, having seen all the greats and been with them, with their mindsets. And yet the other view of maximum depth and thus no exposure, being only a matter of one's thought, not seeing all thoughts out there. Slow and meaningful. I have been developing them separately, but it remains to be seen how I will crystallize them into something so much bigger.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: High Bandwidth, Searching Vast Spaces, and Long Term Vision
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions- with these big scale information networks as an agent you don't want to get lost on the fluff, you need the ability to search vast spaces and get the most value, reach the gems of it and get out. This contributes to the fast and wide part of my duality that I want to crystallize. The other is the slow and deep, the value you create slowly from within, meaningful. So right now searching google on a topic and retrieving the relevant points of information of all corners you seek is fundamental for you to get stuff done fast. Perhaps a start to solving this is when in the battlefield have the capability to move like hell, to compress all and get it done, so then you have time for deeper things. One gets this idea that by having bandwidth, which has the consequence of effectively increasing intelligence, as you see others moving slowly and are capable of having more output, you get to for example watch youtube videos at 2.5x speed. Which on the one hand, you may contend, makes you remember few and not understand much, but on the other, it allows you to skip all uninteresting stuff and get to the real juice, at which point you may open your ears more by slowing down and deepening. It allows you to search the space so much faster and have so many more options. Don't feel guilty thus if you don't finish something or you didn't pay attention along the way. Move on, the world was not made to see every alley, you must be able to move beyond the dirt that slows you down. If you didn't get something the first time, consider not going in there a second. Consider that maybe you are right and that which perhaps others in the world said was interesting for you simply doesn't do it. Don't worry that you will never have mission complete, there is always something more. The game of life distinguishes itself from video games until now for this aspect of extension. An experiment it is, the path to the overhuman. I'm an experiment, that is perhaps emphasized by the emacs thing we will have. Insofar as these tools are concerned, no learning curve or challenge should let your long term vision fall, you shall bet on the long term. If there is a best, then go for it. Just like in travel, get just those things that change your life.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: On the Unexplored and Untamed
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions- there is this certain conspiracy and camaraderie and partner in crime vibe of you and the stars, you and your play. It isn't filmed or written down, just yours. Cause we get too caught up in what human built, we live inside that human's life, not to realize that there are still things impenetrable to all other humans. You and the world, not you and this of the humans thing. There is still untamed, there is still unexplored, you can step at any time into places no other will know.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: On Computation and Creation
uncategorised.content: Quotes and question- Arguably because of P being different from NP you should be careful in verifying work and doing it on your own. If something only takes a bit longer to do on your own rather than verifying what others did, you gain in doing it on your own. Or if there is unwanted work in transforming from others' space of actions and thoughts to your own, rather than just engulfing the problem into your configuration space. Strive for compression when absorbing, strive for going the way when creating. Its about managing computation. Sometimes if others don't prepare their work for you, like just copying and pasting their conversation with the LLM that led them to do some project, then you'd rather do it on your own. It becomes an interesting question whether you should do more of what you can do on your own or what you can't. Cause what you can you should automate if you don't learn any longer from doing it, while you can learn by seeing others do something you can't and trying it. Maximizing learning at every moment isn't conducive to ending projects and getting stuff organized, cause usually the finish of a project you don't learn much you simply want the badge of the end. But in the long term it can allow you to finish bigger more final projects.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: On Bandwidth and Supercharged Learning
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions supercharging your learning is a real thing, having that higher bandwidth is a cheat code. The ability to move faster than anyone should be feared by those who don't have it. I will figure this out perhaps on a technological level with AI, beyond getting the most out of time. George Hotz said this thing that he doesn't need to hide his ideas, for he believes no one can compete with him in doing something with it faster than him. This thing that whatever you have going for you I'm gonna beat you to it. Effectively being ahead of one's time has this component of computation speed, like Nvidia CEO saying their chips allow you to travel in time

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Sam Altman on Productivity Enhancement
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions on his three observations sam altman postulates that in some decades any human can be more productive and impactful than anyone alive today. This comes down to the enhancement of the human through AI for example. Having ever greater tools and abstractions that allows to move at speeds indeed previously inaccessible to humans. We move by train while they are going by car, and in the future movement will be made in air through planes, making each and every obstacles of the ground to which humans gave great efforts to conquer obsolete, our solutions won't be improved upon or rejected but simply irrelevant, the most painful of sentences. When you think of problems of the past, they don't even make sense. We move through them.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: On Social Mirroring II
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions. so funny the effect of looking at people. If they look at you for example in a train you look away, and collective movement is a thing, if you all of a sudden move people will follow that and adjust themselves too.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- On Shame and the Right Reasons
uncategorised.content: Nietzsche says shame is the history of the human. yet it seems we are ashamed all for the wrong reasons. We should be ashamed when you see someone suffering more than us, someone working harder than us, someone learning more than us, doing more than us, and above all living more life than us, loving living more than us, or living loving more than us, or wanting more than us, or dreaming higher than us, or believing greater than us. Pitying rather than being ashamed Nietzsche says, those bastards pitiful bastards.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Irrelevancy and the Ghost's Freedom
uncategorised.content: The greatest unfairness, says Nietzsche, sickness I called it before, is not to be repugnant to someone, but him meaning nothing. Irrelevancy is the most disarming of experiences. Yet it brings you a certain distance away from the humans, gets you away from the noise. Gives you a certain freedom. Being a foreigner everywhere and having no one that knows you or cares about you is still freeing. You have no obligation towards anyone, you live in third person, as if watching humans, as a ghost. You can walk around with no pressure, no standard to meet, no form to take. Having nothing to hold onto, having no home, still gives a hell of a ride.

uncategorised.title: Idea: What is Life With Mind and Matter and Autobiographical Sketches- The Scale of Sustainable Complex Life
uncategorised.content: That sustainable complex life must find a scale where there are no too many fluctuations, where measurement makes sense and accurate laws can be deduced. Thus too small of life here on earth would have to fight brownian motion, would have little control over environment, and the time scales at which it can work are much more little. The bigger the organism the bigger scale in space and time, thus you see suns and planets exist in the most stable of configurations. They need stability to grow into that scale and live on it.

uncategorised.title: Idea: What is Life With Mind and Matter and Autobiographical Sketches- The World That Rewards Shallowness
uncategorised.content: This world at times rewards shallowness and width, for conversations don't usually get to the point where you show depth, rather a lot of conversations are best suited for those who know a lot but don't really know it. Books are read on their covers, their titles, but do you actually know about the thing you know exist? Its cool to know that hitler wrote a book, do you actually know what its about, have you read it? Sometimes we get too fixated on having meta knowledge without actually diving into content.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: The Champion Has a Name
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions there is a certain pain, but to me it goes away very fast and only rarely comes about, about being the only one. About seeing most around me making the wrong decisions, not understanding deeper things. There has never been none and there is only one. Me. The champion has a name baby. Not but now in seriousness, this is an experiment on human potential, this is a self actualization of the overhuman. I carry this message. I came so humanity understands itself, so the universe understands itself, so I understand myself. Just from a very projected to the ground point of view, no one out there has the grip like I do on knowledge and mindset, no one has as many doors open as me. There is no world expert at the intersection of many fields, let alone those that don't exist.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Hero Who Must Not Become Priest
uncategorised.content: For a hero to not fall in the trap of the priest, he must come back around and be at peace with all that of hero was he. Know deep down inasmuch vigor that one has found the best path and that one must be content with knowing that alone, needing not to show others his vision thus. If one has suffered, know that it was voluntary, accept in the extreme case that all suffering one has yielded was voluntary and wasn't needed to get where one's got. Thus freeing oneself from the temptation of imposing that to others, acting as much part of the people as any other inverse of hero has done. Swallowing it whole. Not becoming priest of being a hero. For that imposes form and structure, form and structure that, as much as one has given his life to perfect, one has to accept the futility of it beyond anything that transcends the self. That any other will not understand this vision one preaches, that any other, alone, yet parallel to all others that move beyond the masses and rise to become themselves, will have to find his own form and structure. Thus one paradoxically reaches a state where one has the most to say, yet none of it can be heard. For example, after a long tribulous yet self actualizing career one is in the position to relate it all, yet it can't produce, that narration cannot bring further value than that career has produced. Only after doing all the climb does one know the way to climb. Only after all the work can one get the view that could have previously led him up. Thus the hero fools himself one last time reaching and expressing all his heroicity, not being able to contain it within.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Hero's Last Self-Deception
uncategorised.content: Thus the hero fools himself one last time, now that he wants to express his heroicity. he doesn't understand all he did was for himself. All was voluntary. He starts to believe is mode a little too much, his narrative and vision start to become real to him, so much so that he wants to impose them onto others. He fails to realize that all that in him was hero is not anymore by this sharing. He cannot produce more than he has through making public all he went through to produce his stuff. structure

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Prisoners of Their Own Delusion
uncategorised.content: Prisoners of their delusion that their reality is not just theirs, even if they are right about it, one may go as far as to say. Giving away your story, what you so dearly deared real, having it be squandered, its tough. The realization that one may have wasted life away is as daunting as it is irrational. Cause the momentum builds up, and if one is brought down from the height of the world he has created, if that doubt starts creeping and tearing it, so that one can no longer even enjoy it, so that one cannot not just remember, but live with it, that it brings the highest of men to his knees. That one in this descent can thus fall far below the level of the ground. There is such a thing as sensitive information. One can easily overestimate his power against words and information, the overhuman overcomes this, so that he may die for words, yet live all the same for those he wishes. Most don't dare weather this storm. There is really such a thing as knowledge of something that can make you have no drive to live, lose all your will. I must go beyond this if I am to go further. The world is cruel, and just like we don't really grasp infinity, or the value of life, we don't grasp either what it feels like to know some things. We are but one human. How much can one human take. It is as easy to let something have no effect and let it kill you. A true 50\50, the fairest of things

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Rule of Thumb: Reject Those Who Sell Misery
uncategorised.content: Rule of thumb- if someone tries to sell you misery, maybe for some more or less eloquent reason, you probably don't want it. so always have this pinch of realism in whatever narrative you create for yourself.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- From Smallest to Greatest: Same Flesh
uncategorised.content: That continuous still is the transition from smallest to greatest human, topologically equivalent they are, naked they are but of the same flesh. There is no semblance of the overhuman yet

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- When Reading Yields Nothing
uncategorised.content: Just rode the whole chapter and didn't get anything.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Virtue Sold Cheaply
uncategorised.content: So cheap everyone sells virtue to themselves. So many virtues lying around, but so little selfs to carry their weight. Thus so lightly they invest to their virtue. So transitory their virtue is, rather a momentaneous ego booster than an unshakable tree that has grown out of them

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Drinking Life Through Others' Bottles
uncategorised.content: Unfortunate for those who only drank the pleasure of life through other's bottles. What a shame that there are those who will never know beyond the masses, never come to see their way in life without them. Unclean and impure is the flame that you build with them, by putting wood into their construct.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Masses Must Be Wrong
uncategorised.content: Untrue the masses's spirit has to be, for there is still no overhuman. Wrong they have to be in some ways.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Masses' Inherited Power
uncategorised.content: We shouldn't neglect the amount of power that the masses hold and pass generation to generation, how much they can shape all of yesterday and tomorrow, a la 1984, even if no single one of them can grasp all their impact, or even know why the spirit is a certain way. Those that started and knew their reasons may be far gone, yet their consequences can live on if they aren't intentionally taken care of. We can be stuck on obeying orders from those that don't even exist. the other side of the coin of collective building and standing on the shoulders of giants

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Knowing the Border of the Game
uncategorised.content: being on another different level is much about being aware of the border of the game that the masses play, having no delusion about its scope and its domain of effectiveness. Not being fooled by the glow of what the game gives to those who play it. Those who will it their lives to trying to win this game. Those who thus rest their power on the belief on this game.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Be a Strong Wind Above
uncategorised.content: Be a strong wind that flies over everyone, lives above the masses, has its representative a la god down there, that yet shows no glimpse of the sheer power it holds above.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Dangerous Thought of Redundancy
uncategorised.content: the dangerous that those of the masses may not be needed, they may be redundant. That perhaps most people playing the game of the masses and drinking from its well may truly be irrelevant. That maybe most live truly unmeaningful lives. That Zarathustra almost chokes to death on this. This is a dangerous thought not to be carried out to its practical consequences, but to make one run away from the condition of having its life given away for outrem. It puts urgency into living one's way. This rabble shall carry yourself out of it. Shall be the source of your awareness and escape into your life. Thus one intentionally starts living. Being able to smell and swallow the masses pills, yet totally separated, verily of spirit, from this wind of the low lands. Pay it no mind. Pay every single ounce of mind you have into your way. Yet be unrepugnable by anyhow.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Thank the Many Too Many
uncategorised.content: Thank thus the many too many that allowed you to become one, the many too many pieces that allowed you to become whole and sharp. They showed you the way to climb.

uncategorised.title: Idea: On the Preacher of Equality
uncategorised.content: Preacher of equality of all another great idealists. Untrue to the nature of the world. Incapable of accepting the unfairness of the world sure, but incapable to adapt to win and win in that world? That is inefficient. The concept of justice is blind to the possibility that the present is all there is, and thus is fond of a revenge sentiment buildup in the soul. One thus forges within these forces of narrative, these unreal motives that drive one away from. The at every moment least action path. One runs the danger of dwelling on the past and thus trying to force equality. One can be thrown away from the path of victory for some past centered idea that instead could be made of more use by channeling of its energy into will or even, at times, of total withdrawal from memory.

uncategorised.title: Idea: On Enforcing Sameness
uncategorised.content: the preacher of equality may not just look for equality of justice but making everyone have the same condition as him, enforcing that others be the same as him.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Those Who Want to Punish Cannot Live in the Present
uncategorised.content: Those that want to punish cannot live in the present. They cannot believe in the unreality of the past. They seek power for the wrong reasons, to be at peace with the world they live in, not understanding neither that it isn't theirs nor that it has anything that needs rescue.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- From Diversity to Unification
uncategorised.content: The human is built on diversity, in diversification. The overhuman, on unification, the full cycle of what the seed that was planted as humans came to be had to give. From that on, its no longer human. Here we go.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Life Wants to Grow to Fly
uncategorised.content: Tis life itself, that is, my life, wants to grow into the heights, so that it can go far when it learns to fly. very simple phrase but that explains a lot

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Overcoming Builds the Height to Fly
uncategorised.content: Thus with one's overcoming of values and concepts, one builds the height within, one wins the game, before one can fly away to level up. Weapons these values and concepts are for the destruction of the life you've been living into a greater one without them

uncategorised.title: Idea: On Talent, Equality, and Winning the Moment
uncategorised.content: I still hold the absolute belief of an equality but that to me is not this one. And maybe it is. Maybe I'm incoherent, and that gives me more power. But I have this belief from a very long time that Everyone has the same talent when integrated over all possible parameters. At least when one is born. That everyone has one thing they were born to be the best in the world in. But even here equality doesn't hang on very long, for environmental factors outside your control and, above all, your actions that are in your control Yet at every living moment there can be as a semi thought experiment leaderboard of who is winning the moment, who is winning life in this very moment, who is having the best life this very moment. And it is possible that one wins every single time. So no equality in that sense can make for this. It is possible to live a life better than every other combined.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- On Work Done in Vain
uncategorised.content: The notion of stuff done in vain is one most visceral to me in what can be related to the tarantula's preaching of equality. That it is possible to work very hard on stuff that doesn't matter for anyone, maybe not even for you. That your intentions sometimes may count for nothing, and utilitarianism wins. That indeed peace of mind, like many other things, may be a choice, and that you may live your life lying strategically, having all the inner workings figured out by yourself and show only the final product to people.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Finding Resonance with the World
uncategorised.content: There is this aspect of the self coupling with the environment, whether it be nature or the like. When you are in tune to the world, what it is trying to say, what you are trying to know. You can achieve resonance with the world you live. You can find resonances with places, they catch your spirit and set it free and dancing. Verily they do just that, resonance- they amplify you into heights you haven't heretofore imagined, they allow you to go further and get more spirit, more power of power. There is much advice spoiled and spilled on the world that converges on finding resonances in them, and then exploiting them maximally. Not stopping when one finds one. There is an unstill and untillable, undistilled and undistillable force within. A craving that one with words falls short of covering, and that one should follow like one follows light into a tunnel, a glimmer of hope into the way out of plato's cave and into the real world. An instinctive drive that lets one fearless, flow. Fearless and without narration above all. That is what makes the moment so pure and unnamed and untamed. There is nothing you can write about it to bring you closer to it. There is nothing you can write about it that doesn't destroy it as it is being written. One who recounts the moment or narrates it or describes it cannot be living it. One has to distill the undistillable to pass it on, thus one can't pass but a wrong proxy, a simulacra delta dirac that for only he who truly knows it holds value and holds tremendous value. If people were just to stay shut they would see much beyond what they have lived, they would recognize the heights and the value of the moments that only they had.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Language as Tool, World as Experience Beyond It
uncategorised.content: Language is a tool of thought and communication, but the world as an invention is much older and perfected than it. Your eyes tell you so much that you underestimate just cause you can't put it into words. Your experience goes so much beyond what can even be projected onto and represented by language. If I couldn't write down and contribute to the cult of the overhuman through human's progress, if I couldn't document this journey of the overhuman, then I would just allow myself to experience. To experience reality better than anyone who is already too closed minded to think that the resonances and the coupling was to be made solely through language this new thing.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Saying a Word Ruins the Moment
uncategorised.content: There is some very very real sense in which saying a word ruins the moment. You have the temptation to say it to show others you are all on the same page, but it just ruins it. One just had to follow this temptation and label the moment. Not allowing it to grow, not allowing it to be something else, what it wants to be, what it is. Pure is the moment, that it is uncaptured, unfigured out, unsolved in your heart, your heart, you now free spirit, free from the temptation to categorize, free from conquering instead of discovering, the former can always be done, the latter only a seeker, a truthful with a greater will than the last who dared honestly and truthfully to go as far as anyone, you raw likewise resonant coupling untamed beast that no other can put into words or he'll miss you, you now live over the human.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Embracing Incoherence and Open Doors
uncategorised.content: You that aren't afraid of being incoherent, you that embrace the pain of not having it all figured out, you that live with all unfigured out. Maybe only you overhuman can figure out everything everywhere all at once. You never cut yourself too short. You always allow room, which is a burden for one to never see the end of things, it is harder than it seems to leave all doors open. One can be consumed by one's freedom, by one's will and reach. One's sense of ignorance and smallness can take over. You thus walk the path of no return, of no returns for you never finish anything, you never erase the possibility of it being necessary in the final great reconstruction and unification of all that you have, or haven't, figured out. the path of progression, of choice, joy you make outta those two, just to complete Ben Goertzel's three principles for life. There is the possibility that the puzzle will tame all doors you opened to be solved, that it takes everything everywhere all at once.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Dilemma of the Overhuman
uncategorised.content: The dilemma of the Zarathustra, the dilemma of an overhuman, that is solitary, yet isn't understood by the regular human, and the other overhumans solitary too, hardly will the conditions follow that they illuminate one another if they exist. Yet to go to the untruthful human as a famous wise man, or be truthful and crazy.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Everything Fits Only at the End
uncategorised.content: A more real sense in which everything is supposed to fit together only at the end. Rest only at the end not in the middle. Its that only after you've gone through it all perhaps are you ready to go through it all over and get the parts that you didn't. Now that you know it you can actually understand it, considering of doing this with this book. Cause if Zarathustra talking to humans or the overhuman talking to humans, they wouldn't understand a thing at first, order is taught, for you learn biases when learning certain things first. You get exposed not to things you understand and get progressively closer to the vision that is being teached but rather you start getting exposed to it and try to hang on and actually start getting it. So at the beginning a lot of what you see in it you don't understand and can only understand after being through other things that that vision has to offer. So technically you can only start to understand the whole thing after ending it. This is my vision. If you're presented with a whole new vision then this is the path to take. Perhaps we cut ourselves super inefficiently short by only reading a book like this once. Perhaps we did 80 percent of the work to get only 20 per cent of the rewards.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- First Hear, Then Resonate
uncategorised.content: First hear the sound of the world, only then can you vibrate to its frequency. Only then can you hope to Resonate with it.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Dance Between Life and Wisdom
uncategorised.content: The dance and the day and Zarathustra and his lover life, wisdom his little secret that life may be worried about. Wisdom and life so similar, thus competing.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Silent Grave of Past Moments
uncategorised.content: The silent grave of the past of those moments that are constantly being killed.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Who Possessed Whom?
uncategorised.content: Who possessed who between you and your moments, and the disloyalty that you both innocently abandon each other.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- A Smile That Fades
uncategorised.content: A smile that dies away at a distance. The most harshest of murders for the moment, for it doesn't get exterminated, but rather fades away, never really dying, never really warning. The death of one and onto the next, this perhaps could really be the most fundamental law of nature and law of life, nature in the wild sense. Outros melhores!

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Playful Spirits of Youth
uncategorised.content: The playful spirits that played along with you in those youthful wisdom filled life filled visions that fled with the moment, fled much more thoroughly, much more costly than those of today, which we take easy, but would we that we would grab with teeth and nail those much precious moments that were truly lived. Moments that instead of dying live ferociously. Transcend time. Eternal they were cut short, murdered our innocence, now we can only get a close up, we lack mostly reality. That's what we want to get back. That's my job to live every moment like the overhuman learned from his underhuman child that yet went over and beyond all that humans come to be ripe for. Freedom is interesting to ponder when it was fun to imagine! when you could and were willing to and could afford to throw a day off to some imagination, irrespective of the whole world that wasn't inside your creation. Indifferent to any complications. This people seek, the freedom from complication, but they still only with that fall short of the full child experience. Conserve principles that you long had planted in your heart, and get back to those you have abandoned so they come on even stronger. Everyday is a new day, many people forget that and its consequences.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Will That Survives All Seasons
uncategorised.content: The will survives. The will is the all equalizer greatest common divisor. Concurrent and parallel and whole and single. The will stays unentered and only affected on the exterior past the seasons and the weathers. It phases the seasons and seasons the weathers and weathers the storms. Will to life. Will to power. Will of spirit. For too long have we repressed the unholy our will. We have forgotten to live by it. To follow it. We have come to learn to believe more in unreal thing over the ever real will. We need more reality. Find the will. Let it free. Unleash the dangerous controlled will. I will my will, and I will my life and my life wills it.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Ancient Wheel Deserving Rediscovery
uncategorised.content: Ancient wheel that needs and deserves rediscovery, deserve completeness. Deserves to see the light of day. Deserves to see itself become what it is. Destiny it is to bring about the reality of the most real.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- So Much Death of Moments
uncategorised.content: So much death of moments, that at last at least the will may see itself in this life or the next! Unredeemed is the unfree one. One can't be fulfilled unless one is free.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Freedom of Will in Childhood
uncategorised.content: It is interesting again to think about freedom in childhood. But are you free? The phrase to put. Here and everywhere. Well the will of the child is free and set free, even if all the rest is imposed onto her, even if she doesn't know any better. She does know better. For over time we trade this life affirming freedom of will for freedom of world where our will isn't free. That is the tradeoff Kaczynski wasn't willing to take. Incompleteness of will is the disease of mankind as it entered human age. And its overcoming is the cure to bring about the overhuman, whose freedom is the most real and powerful.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Will Brings the Moment to Life
uncategorised.content: Will that brings that moment to life. That makes the moment eternal, that saves from the genocide, that transcends time, that outnatures the child.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Will to Truth and Freedom
uncategorised.content: Will to truth, that is yet unfounded doesn't it come from the naturality of the newborn overhuman. No one who isn't free can be driven by the will to truth to truth.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Godlike Belief, Will, and Action
uncategorised.content: Call your will to become that of a God. Let your belief and will and action thus carry themselves to that of a God. Godlike belief with Godlike will and no action is deprivation. Godlike belief with no will is waste.

uncategorised.title: Idea: The Competition of Wills and Beliefs
uncategorised.content: Again the world is a competition of wills, as much as it is a competition of ideas and beliefs. Who wills it stronger will have it willed. What he wills Stronger will be. Thus will is the passport to freedom. And yet to the privileged slavery of having to act to avoid deprivation. Preachers of equality don't notice the absolute equality of will and its access.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Belief, Will, Action, and Reality
uncategorised.content: Things are more possibly real the more they are believed. They become the more real the more they are willed. They are the most real the more they are acted on.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Health vs Performance
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: health and performance are different things. Is health a part of your performance or your performance a part of your health.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Smooth and Malleable World
uncategorised.content: Smooth and malleable do you want the world. Of a computationally to your will efficient you want its material, of malleability to your will, blood of the same blood, comrade do you want it. Visible, and touchable, and changeable do you want it. Willable and thinkable, one which to every activity of yours is lower than you, obeys your overpower over it, it is equal to you in its essence, for then it is conquerable, competable, of a war like kind, and you shall win it.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- All Matter as Mirror of Spirit
uncategorised.content: All matter shall be mirror and reflected image of the spirit, says Nietzsche. Mirror for you shall see yourself in it everywhere. Reflected for it shall see you and be according to you.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The World as Big as Your Will
uncategorised.content: The world as will and representation. As your entire will. The world is as big as your will allows it to be, it is as big as you will it. It shall be big and yours.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Full Until Intoxication
uncategorised.content: Full you want to be, until intoxication, until you get disgusted at this world of so much living it and eating it. You hope for a meal that now challenges you.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Unwise Outsource Their World
uncategorised.content: The unwise see life like a river that they ride for fortune, they see it eternal, they underestimate beyond the maximum of the space of daring beliefs their role in the river, their importance, their necessity for its flow, they guard themselves of responsibility, hiding behind the naturalness that the eternal they imagine seems to have. They outsource their world.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- No Idealizations Needed to Light the Fire
uncategorised.content: That with no idealizations you can still light a fire deep within your heart. That shall be your power, that you need no rescue of higher powers, that the very real powers shall be all you need, that yet all the powers shall be what you seek and want. that greatness yet can be measured through your reach, the power of the drives you are able to hold within. The power of your power, your spirit, is the measure of the power which you can hold through those drives that want to escape you, want to be free yet are slaves to your mastery you that exercise control over all that your mind can fathom. The stillness of holding the universe at one fist, above all its an ability of shutting off everything you want. People underestimate how incapable they are of shutting all down. Meditation is the very start where you can let your thoughts go. But people don't understand they can get attached to stuff deeper than passing thoughts, in fact some live a whole life a way that wouldn't be if they could shut off some drives, if they knew themselves and made themselves. You should be a universal instructor and constructor of yourself. You are a universal machine capable of being anything, and a universal constructor capable of building it out whatever it is.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Easy Ways Out of Reality
uncategorised.content: There are easy ways out of reality, you can lose it, you can lose grasp of it, hard is to hold all drives still and hold all options open and feel the full power of superposition that your true power implies. Most people would rather collapse their whole into something easier something more graspable by themselves and others, something which can be written, something understandable, something rational, justifiable, not a raw untamed wild beast that goes beyond the projections the mind uses to exercise control, goes beyond the very finite limits tractable to our mind, beyond any language and beyond any program, beyond concepts and conceptions, beyond idea and experience.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Humans as Masters of Making Things Understandable
uncategorised.content: Easy ways out are what humans thus have become masters of. We should marvel at the little world we have made for ourselves and our little heads and scopes, and sight and vision. Our greatest masterpiece as a species is that we made something understandable, we picked out the best piece of the world to be understood and relied on.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Lost in Fiction, Against Reality
uncategorised.content: One can then get lost in his way out of reality, in his fiction man loses himself, and his fiction talks to him so gently he even turns against the very reality that brought him there. One can start to despise the reality that now takes the form of shadow of a greater cause.

uncategorised.title: Idea: On Life Affirmation as Persistent Quality
uncategorised.content: Beyond the reality of the world this affirmation of life and the self and the world and the yes saying to all that exists, all that all the more is but a spark, rather a persistent quality, persistent qualities are scarce in a world that at every moment takes from you all that you had that very moment.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Conditions for Greatness Are Disadvantageous
uncategorised.content: Conditions for your most fundamental greatness are obviously disadvantageous, if that greatness is truly the motive.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Self-Fortifying Beliefs
uncategorised.content: Among those beliefs that self fortify are the belief that power can be attained, can be good, and that all drives can be fulfilled. Fundamentally placing no limit in the power of your being, in how much you can juggle. Everything everywhere all at once. It is possible that it is possible to maximize every drive, and that in fact the pushing of any one drive is independent of any other, that they all add up that they all interfere constructively, however hard may it be.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Drives That Are Contrarian and Inaccessible
uncategorised.content: Drives those that are as tested as much as they are contrarian, inaccessible. Those that language or program treat poorly, in modernity or in humanity. Yet find no reason to ditch the easy ones that most already have. There is no further merit to contrarian than that it can work

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Stretching the Soul Through Extreme Drives
uncategorised.content: Through extreme drives and opposites stretching the soul Pushing its limits. So that one may produce beyond what was already produced. The more these elastic drives are pushed together the greater the potential and the greater the flight when they get released.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Valuations as Arbitrary Self-Fulfilling Principles
uncategorised.content: That valuations as arbitrary as the self fulfilling principles of power sometimes carry people away, they thus drift by the hands of power of else who's.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Your Will on the River of Becoming
uncategorised.content: "Your will and your values have you placed on the river of becoming." you bet your values on yourself. You bet your power on your power. You are a mixture of what it is that you bet in and what it is that those who bet on you are.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Choose With Whom You Cross the River
uncategorised.content: You choose with whom you cross the river. With your becoming or someone else's being.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Always Win: The Meta-Belief
uncategorised.content: My brother ruben said hypnosis- win, I always win. What if you are crazy enough to believe you always win? That is advantageous, if of course you still learn from your mistakes, you simply have the meta belief that whatever happens was still a win in the long run. That makes you keep up the pace, never letting go for you are in a winning position and keep it must be. You never have reason to be let down, you always go into the next moment as a winner shall you be.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- They Can Have the Recipe
uncategorised.content: They can have the recipe but they can't make the sauce. They see a very distilled and to their world compressed view, a shallow projection of the immensity of your will they can't grasp. At the deeper level they can't read your will. You must make that so. It should be so yours as so not of the world and of everyone and be written in a language so yours and not of the world and be about something so yours that only you shall will it. Your will is yours to will it.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Make Every Will Descend from Yours
uncategorised.content: Make every will descendent of your mother will their master! Make the boats thus go behind you that go with that much more force now. Make every will of the world be such to strengthen yours. It should be that you believe all of those wills are here just to push yours forward, just so you develop yours the longer, and see for it a greater dimension than intuition alone would dare imagine. Conquer them then overcome them, incorporate every will that has already been worked out by those of the past into your arsenal. Master

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Your Will to Power Is Your Danger
uncategorised.content: Your will to power is your danger, for it is undeniable and unstoppable and real. That which cannot exhaust, that which isn't finite or bound, limited or encapsulated. That which no box can cover, no tingling can't turn around, that for which no price can be attributed or negotiated, that which the finite, the bound and limited, the encapsulated, cannot corrupt.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Way of All Living
uncategorised.content: The way of all living and the all way of living. The latter's understanding is a way of reaching the former, in its full understanding. intuition built a la deep learning, namely with representation, and little tidbits of symbolic aspects that you attach to it allows you to see things before even working them out, you already saw the existence of the idea before you made it out. I noticed this happened with writing and also with algebra as in seeing a possible way of writing a complex expression.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Read Beyond Words
uncategorised.content: Look at all that people tell you, not just what comes out of their mouth. I mean this and the less ambitious version that you really see what they tell you, what they communicate explicitly, not just implicitly through actions, but also explicitly through their eye and expression. One hell of a potent cheat code that you could expand your language, for hearing the way of the world and for expressing your way. The world opens to you if you know how to talk to it. Yet through this master the art of while having the language of everything not collapsing stuff into it, having the ability to thus hear what is not even there, that is an even greater step. And make your language evolve in the process that you read something that your language doesn't have, which implies that you got it outside of that language. if language can dictate thinking then you want the filter to be as little disruptive as possible, you want to be able to accommodate in your language all that there is yet be able to see it outside of your language. Thus you converge at reality from the direction of Seeing itself pure with no words to put on what you see, and put words ever closer to the pure that you destroyed at the start.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Quantum Collapse of Language
uncategorised.content: There is a suspiciously similar dynamic in this characterization of the world and the measurement with collapse in quantum mechanics. You cannot put words on something without destroying what it was. Not even see it, nor any interaction with it. You can never contain the world in which you live, the world. This is the escape for reality. That it can only be perceived without register, without trace,

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Language as Sufficient for Freedom
uncategorised.content: For some the world is big enough and possibly language big enough that all it takes for them is that they keep experiencing new things, which can be expressed with the farther reaches of that language which expands the usual. novelty can be obtained alone from language. And is that not freedom that it lets us express the greatest and greater things. It lets us experience that. And a shared world that we were condemned to is better shared if we can also share, through language, all that we can express about it. If we make that language public people will meet you at that level. For some joy choice and progress is obtained through language alone. Just so you understand that if language was all there ever was we'd be good to go and win the world

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Language as the Huxley Tape
uncategorised.content: Just so you understand with language alone you could win the world and express and experience everything. The huxley machine, the huxley tape could be made out of language. This duality of the convergence of the limit is at the base of simulacrum and simulation, red pill and blue pill.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Living Are Stuck to Their Gift
uncategorised.content: Yet the living are in a sense stuck. They got the gift of existence, they are bound to it and its creator.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Slave Only to Your Own Will
uncategorised.content: So it seems the solution to this every man is a slave to something issue is precisely being a slave only and only of your own will. One and only with your will. So losing all your freedom to the escape to your freedom. That the way of the living is a way of obedience. This aligns with there being no free will. It means that there is always a will, whether yours or another's. You can will your wills but not will what you will, said Schopenhauer. There is no free man in the strong sense perhaps, let there be at least in the weak sense that you choose your will, and let it be yours. so Gil's hierarchy of freedom- you can choose your will among the available, then you can choose your will in that you make it, so you go from deciding a posteriori to a priori, and then you are free from wills, something that Nietzsche hasn't mentioned and is my task to develop. For that last transition you gotta first be owner of all wills, slave to none. Only then can you live without them that they have made you rise over the free human. The over free human. Free from wills, here we dive.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Free from Wills: Loving Your Creations to Freedom
uncategorised.content: Free from wills means free from the love you have towards what you create. Your creations become independent even though you created. Dirac delta's start flying everywhere, that you so much love something to make it come alive, thus you bless it with the game of life, yet so fast you overcome it and not let it stall you, thus you both escape and play the game of life.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Information Quality and the Expert's Presence
uncategorised.content: We also get a simulacrum condition of the convergence of the limit when talking about the quality of information you get at the personal aspect. What would be higher quality? A lecture by Cohen-Tannoudji with him alone and the blackboard or him with slides? Of course empowerment through slides is more efficient, but all of a sudden you can have someone who doesn't know anything taking advantage of the slides, whereas Cohen-Tannoudji would still give a quality lecture without them. So for the maximum output you want both the information in an accessible way, so accessible that you may think you'd rather just take it at home while you eat, where you can go at your speed, but you also want the person to be in total domination of the material, and have great questions and answers, but if the material is good enough it simply is better than the person talking, for it took perhaps days of work from that person to put down. So you get unreality yet reality that you believe Cohen-Tannoudji is credible.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Know When to Leave
uncategorised.content: Like in everything, you gotta know when to leave. In the casino, when you are figuring something out. Rather leave it just not totally complete than fill it and take away from yourself the opportunity to complete it. Be of the use of time, many people want to finish something right after starting it, not realizing the power to retrieve from letting time pass and coming back to it different, that is what makes it more complete in reality, and big things can be build by consistent coming back to it.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Human Progress as More Possibilities
uncategorised.content: Human progress was always in the way of more possibilities, well invention is just that so not much surprise there. But we forget many inventions. Those that are so obvious we forget, to the point that we may not even remember they are inventions. Language. The concept of a lie, which had to be invented and we gained power and possibility through it.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Many Won't Want to Command
uncategorised.content: And many a people won't want to command, won't want to let go of that which enslaves them. A sort of stockholm syndrome on a smaller scale. Many people are just fine with obeying, even if others, let alone commanding, even the more others.

uncategorised.title: Idea: [NEEDS TITLE — Sunday, 18 May 2025 13:31:39]
uncategorised.content: Commanding takes really that you expose yourself, that you allow yourself to be object of obeying, that you go one to many hand to hand. That you must gather the multiplicity within to take on multiple people at the same time, this is one way to grow tall, to be equivalent to many, physically mentally linguistically. Commanding yourself the more multiplicity it yields, for for all yous you have to battle with. Both go to war with side by side, but also be able to take on every last one of them at once, thus you form your strongest self, which in risk and experiment, by winning can only be the one commandant of all the squad and all the forces that you are. There you must reach.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Self-Play and Internal Evolution
uncategorised.content: Thus one gets to this self play self paced conception of progress within. Evolutionary selection at your pace that can far exceed others's ability to even comprehend.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Your Core, Hidden from Others
uncategorised.content: And how could others interfere with this internal judge and internal battles and internal evolution that they can't see, they who see only the winning commander, and mostly don't even see him? This is your core, that you stick to, and that lives beyond the selves with others that you have.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Law of the Strongest and Life as Master
uncategorised.content: Nietzsche puts forward this explanation that the law of the strongest being the master of the weaker comes from everyone and not only the strongest let alone the stronger. That even the strongest yields to life itself its master. That all the both weaker and stronger to something serve the stronger and endorse this yielding so that they can be masters of the weaker. Thus one plays this game of life. Thus life is obeying, that Nietzsche puts great emphasis in having figured out. Even the greatest, and precisely because that coined term makes only sense for those who play this game, is still slave to something, hasn't escaped his slavery to life itself. On the one hand it makes some sense for the master of the game to keep playing the game by being itself a slave, but symmetrically to all others, thus the argument extends.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Induced Order for Progression
uncategorised.content: This is the induced order from only which a progression can be made out of. One thus axiomatically builds the requisites of life.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Playing with Death: Beyond Life
uncategorised.content: And so the greatest which has risen through and throughout, he plays with death, for everything is left is to escape life. People have this conception of death as dying and waking up in another place. That is the kind of that that he who has mastered all but life can now master. Free from wills. People don't know if he who was born outta life can go beyond it, can be independent of it, nobody knows whether really. They don't know if a god can be made outta man. They don't know if this life of ours can be escaped. If one can stop playing the game of life without that killing him not just in life but everywhere. Can one play another game. Can one detach from mother nature that brought him.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Master's Game and Hierarchical Emergence
uncategorised.content: That yet the master may give much freedom to its slave, the masterness is more so that the slave plays the game of the master, not that inside it it can't do whatever it wants, and hold enslaved others as master too. And so to life it is even more ungrateful and even more shocking that one would transcend it that allows you to master everything, as long as you keep playing its game. It allows you to be master of all wills and even free from wills. Thus the universe would stand in shock that one would even do it. So sometimes you play other's games because you don't know better. thus bosses make their game out of their employees who don't know they can be bosses too. yet the autonomy between scales, in this hierarchical structure of emergent games, (software in the natural world- a computational approach to hierarchical emergence informational closure, that you can compress different scales as their own autonomous systems, that within them you can compress, which is to say, correctly model from the data of that scale alone and causally connect the objects of that scale.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Purpose Through the Master-Slave Order
uncategorised.content: Maybe a purpose can only be introduced through the ordering of master slave. That thus master and slave need each other. They feed off each other. That through ordering one has place to go, namely over and beyond, and that can be the purpose of not our life but life itself.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- One Is Struggle and Conflict of Purposes
uncategorised.content: One is struggle and thus others struggle to understand you. One is a struggle but a becoming says Nietzsche. Yet one is also a conflict of purposes he adds. That your soul stretches to many sides makes you more indecipherable. They will never know which principle you will invoke. You are always anew. If you had a clear and public or mappable traceable purpose it could be used against you. Thus in the unspoken ununderstood way to over and beyond you are unpredictable. And purely random, in the limit, so absolutely impregnable, intractable, unattackable, do you become when you become free from wills. You are yourself more than anyone is themselves for your whole is all you are, you are unmistakable exactly for your untraceability. Either you are or you are not.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Love Something Enough to Free It
uncategorised.content: For if you love something sufficiently enough you will bless it with freedom, you will perhaps assist with not knowing where it came from, that it may not shed shadow on where it can grow. Your most precious creations you don't want to put your fingerprint on not to damage them. Thus god raised the universe and disappeared at once.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The World Is Transactional
uncategorised.content: There is no good and evil at all beyond that which at a given moment keeps one moving. The world is transactional, and nothing to you is given. Nothing at any moment is telling you something. You make it all up for your own benefit, just don't get permanently attached to things that you gave yourself. At every moment your intention decides what gets to keep living and what doesn't.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Be Afraid of Nothing, Even Harsh Truths
uncategorised.content: Be afraid of nothing, even harsh truths, we had already gotten there previously. Now silenced truths become toxic, says Nietzsche. If others have seen more of these than you, if you shied away from one of these that may come to haunt you, it may present as weakness on you, that you are not capable of realizing it. That certain smell gets you away. Yet no smell ought to get you away, you have battled all evil, none of it can intimidate you.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Elephants in the Room Grow
uncategorised.content: The elephants in the room grow ever more the longer they are unaddressed. Unchecked. Unbalanced. If you don't check the prisoner evil is inside its cell, if you don't gather yourself to look at it, it may have already escaped. It may have already latched onto to other things unknowingly. With these evils you want to tame them, contain them, and isolate them, that they may be yours and never something of you be theirs.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- No Mysteries: What Makes You Top-Performing
uncategorised.content: This is what makes you abnormal and top performant. Is that there are no mysteries. While for others there are ever more mysteries that they don't see the process and only the magic, for you it is all clear, you've seen it all.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Hard Core with No Form
uncategorised.content: The image you want to have is that of a hard core that can either be absolutely still or teeming with the greatest form of life. When it comes down to it, be built out of building blocks that are like water, they can flow or they can crash. That hard as anything core that is unbreakable precisely cause it has no form.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Everyone Sees Themselves at the Center
uncategorised.content: Everyone sees the world through them being at the center. Everyone sees things in such a way that they who see it are the balanced ones. Thus when an author for example tries to add something to knowledge with his own thing, trying to fit it in the wheel and make it correct for him, even tho he tried to have the complete theory with him adding his own bit and yet having the balance to connect everything, people reading will want to associate him much more with just the bit he added, making him a champion of it, and they themselves as the balanced ones who now incorporate that into the whole.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- He Who Has a Why, He Who Has a How
uncategorised.content: That he who has a why to live can bare anyhow. But also that he who has a how to live can bare any why, said Jonathan Bi probably from someone else too.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- In Secret the Overhuman Is Born
uncategorised.content: Thus in secret the overhuman is born. But it shall not be explained for now. Singularity.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Capable of All Disorder, Master of Stillness
uncategorised.content: Be capable of all disorder, yet as much capable of shutting it all down and be still. May no wild beast be able to wreck your focus. That you be able to handle all chaos and everything everywhere all at once. Maybe you overcome those beasts, not avoid them. May you not be withdrawn from the full experience there is.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Apply Tension, Then Let Go
uncategorised.content: You gotta be able to apply tension to control it all, yet let yourself go with the most random of flows. Tense yourself too early, and tensing means you come back to your core, that all other modes of movement don't roll with you, and you may be losing on a lot. Be able to be super flexible and extend the soul in all directions, yet at all times knowing you could control it all. There is more power to knowing you can do stuff than people realize. The counterfactual world truly has consequence in the so called real world. If you know how something would go if you did it, you may not be bound to it, you may be free to think other things, you don't have to go ahead and confirm. If you already saw the end of the line through one path, you may not need to follow it if you see it has not great value. You may have greater pace of executing and operating inside your head, that your mental model of others for example can run faster than themselves, even tho there is some component that you don't learn because you didn't get the randomness of the real world.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Withdrawn from Valueless, Not from Unknowing
uncategorised.content: You want to be Withdrawn from parts of the world without value, not without knowing.

uncategorised.title: Idea: [NEEDS TITLE — Tuesday, 3 June 2025 22:05:29]
uncategorised.content: Que gostos nao se discutem, mas que a vida é sobre disutir gostos, that all life is disputing over taste and tasting says Nietzsche. life as the battle of wills presents no more than the subjective to be discussed. Because it isn't discussed says the proverb, can you discuss it without hearing anyone. Because no one can take away from you your wills, for they are totally subjective. You can actually have them and change them and see where they lead you, whereas in non willed things you progress onto something, which is good but isn't generator of time evolution, rather it sets the time we are in.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- A Hungry Lion Is Stronger
uncategorised.content: That a hungry lion is stronger. This idea that when you are stripped of what you want you want it that much more and you are more ferocious and able to tap into a primal nerve that propels you. Make it yours this drive. All of the food for thought and food and food of good that enters you you must burn it to keep yourself from the mindstate of the content.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- All Choice Is About Taste
uncategorised.content: And all choice is about taste and tasting after all.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Taste as the Weight and Measure
uncategorised.content: Nietzsche says taste is the weight and what weighs. Is it the measure and the measured. The compared and the source of comparison. It is that by which you judge things, that they can be judged means they are tastes of some form, and at the same time the value of your own, that is only your own if it is your judgment, your taste.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Becoming Free of Shadow
uncategorised.content: Become free of shadow. No shadow for you have lived with it and now it is nothing, it is part of you, it is not any longer a shadow of variable size that can seem like a monster when its a tiny rabbit. That you turn away from yourself and conquer the dark lands of your shadow, not just the unconscious, but the conscious shadow, that which you consciously put away, that which can't stand and you thus send to the far and cold, brief and loud domain of the shadows. You conquer those lands and nothing from it can now sparkle unrest. Fear it you may, but fundamental confidence you have to walk those your terrains. A step to free from wills is to be free from tastes. To grab them all and in the same way let them go. To become spectator to them, in control. Rationalize them, as in they are no more than a fact you confirm or disconfirm, not a thing that sparkles your need of them, oo the power of normalization. Some people give halos to normalization, normalizing your victories, moving on fast. Yet it is much too, that is also much, about leaving no stone unturned, and no what ifs unrealized. Knowing the possibilities, not casting some shadow or some divine light at some things.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Tastes vs Wills
uncategorised.content: Tastes as one knows can be much more superficial yet unconscious than wills, those intentional beasts, that yet can run so deep into your being. Taste decides for you many things, or rather your taste of something gets many of its features before you even taste it. Free from taste means you've seen it all that your mind comprehends, having no part of your mind left uncomprehended, so that no projection from above or rising of a shadow from the depths could corrupt the experience. But actually this is the part that you comprehend you comprehend. I feel one shouldn't shy away from, which again brings the self referential paradox, having one part of the mind totally unknown, that is part of wanting to know more, is that you have something that doesn't quite make the whole thing perfect. There must be always something getting on the way, a little mosquito that ruins the moment yet gives you space to taste it right there and there about, that doesn't quite allow you to say you've got it all. That keeps you moving.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Still Bits of Despising
uncategorised.content: There is still bits of despising, that means his body hasn't yet developed the enzymes to treat anyhow, weakness. One becomes neutral, then one develops tastes anew, whose fire shows only truth brought about by neutrality.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Power of Normalization
uncategorised.content: Normalising allows above all to get stuff done, to not think of the upcoming moment as holy, thus one doesn't have to pray to it, or hear music to reach an elevated mental state which can just fall below baseline after he gets away from that moment. It allows you to move past and get more. If you know deep down you want something, this lack of celebration in the middle, this lack of rest in the middle, won't harm your will.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Removing the Inherited Filters
uncategorised.content: There are still some filters to be taken out from the inside of your mind. Some conceptions, they call it preconceptions, because it wasn't this your being now present who decided upon them, it was thrown into you, whether by external things or even by previous versions of you. Free yourself from the stuff that previous versions of you used for their own sake. Do not confuse yourself with this, open your mind. Open your mind means opening the doors that you haven't opened, pressing the buttons that you haven't, and understanding your mind, picking apart its parts.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Don't Rest Until You Know
uncategorised.content: Don't rest until you know it and be at the end all be all.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Preacher of the Earthly and the Normal
uncategorised.content: And how advantageous is it to be a preacher of that which is all consistent, the earthly, the normal. No need for anything abnormal. You can rise over and beyond this world through all normality.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Fairness of the Lived Moment
uncategorised.content: If there is further fairness and equality in this world is in that the moment is lived. There is really no memory in that you may have crossed all 7 layers of hell right before being born into a moment, you are all the same. All the like the same. This can be taken advantage of, that you truly can go through these layers, head down, consciousness of if you so please and only awaken in the other side. You cannot trade now for later. Either you grab something now or never. Now or never, ever. If in doubt flat out. No saving now will increase your later output. That is always the same lie.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Withdrawn: Believers in Time's Extension
uncategorised.content: Withdrawn are many a people, deprived by themselves, that they believe in extensions of time. That they believe something like the past exists, that they believe they have much power over themselves in the future. Withdrawn from their fullest expression. There is only to add, nothing can ever diminish you now or ever.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Soul of the Bull
uncategorised.content: The soul of the bull pushing in all directions and ragely so, ragely at that which he cannot control, which still gives him power and control over what he controls. Yes he focus so much on what he can control that he leverages what he cannot for it use the rage against the minimum thing that has been given to you that yet you believe won't change, like the finiteness of life or whatever. Yet precisely through what those fortunes that have been handed to you you can be grateful of the cards you are handed, you can recognize opportunity.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Freedom in Present-Moment Adaptability
uncategorised.content: There is much freedom in adaptability, in present moment to moment adaptability. Being able to carry all the past and the future within, yet being able to let go of all of it, be here now and change direction, and then succeed in the new avenue you find yourself in. That is survival, power and freedom.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Making Time Stand Still
uncategorised.content: With the cards you are handed don't neglect the power of making time stand still. That you have nothing you can do for example. That maybe your train is 5 hours late and you are in the middle of nowhere, with only your thoughts and maybe something to immortalize them, a pen and paper for example. No rush, no duty, you have it right now, free time.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- No Illusions About Time
uncategorised.content: Have no illusions about your time here on earth and otherwise. If something got delayed you didn't win time, you may have even lost it if you adapt yourself to that new time. The time on earth is finite and if you lose days you are doing just that, losing, the count on the days here won't increase, it never does.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Winning From Others' Frustrations
uncategorised.content: And of what you can't control and off of delays and things that mess up life you can actually win by pulling on other's frustrations to move ahead, you see their reaction and you smell blood in the water, you go win.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Stockholm Syndrome with Lies
uncategorised.content: It feels that even after lies are dismantled people still waste time believing them, some sort of stockholm syndrome mixed with bias for what you previously believed, attachment.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Delusionality Has Power
uncategorised.content: Delusionality, there is power in it. Building a mystique around yourself, it goes along with it. For example this belief I now share with you, helper, even if obviously untrue for some. That I see the people who watch my instagram stories and believe they all see it, even people I thought wouldn't, and those to whom I don't correspond by also seeing theirs, I believe they see it as support, they know I'm the one and they believe in me, they look to see if I have already become all that they saw in me to be.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Memoryless World, Memoryless You
uncategorised.content: Memoryless this world is and memoryless should you be, not letting yourself be shadowed by your deed, nor your eye by the vision you developed.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Being Active with Your Investments of Time
