But the overhuman doesn't find in humans enough great feelings and caring. He is alone in this, this can be a pain for him, but he has to search inside, which makes his caring even more his and genuine. now one thing that can make you sad by there being no walls between work days and vacation, and this kind of thing and a new kind of thing, is that you are numb to the passage of time. There are no big marking points. You finish your student years, like having the last class of your life, but it doesn't affect you, you move on right away to the next thing.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: On Procrastinating the Next Step
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: I've been reported as procrastinating on taking the next step. But there is real power in having the best world model. Of course some procrastinations lead to nothing, but other forms of investing into your world model pay off, and when you come back to the real world per say where you act, you act damn quickly. You let the real world steps process in the unconscious while you are doing other things, and when you come back you do so with a solution. Now this may explain why people don't want to be where they are at, always. They let themselves be filled. They can't rise to the occasion, they can't rise to grow enough to be bigger than what was imposed on them, which was what was imagined and put on the line by the other person, or entity, or institution.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Solving Intelligence
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: what a time to be alive, and perhaps I should really take advantage that we are in the time of perhaps the birth of superintelligence and the greatest change in human history. Hassabis's solving intelligence to solve everything else could be imagined very explicitly as someone for example having built a superintelligence, that you interfaced with and gave you, proportional to the quality of your input but just orders of magnitude over any variation in the input, the right answers and solutions, to physics problems and stuff alike. one single person could make discoveries in one day worth 100 nobel prizes today, and if they did a paper on this technology since everybody would start using it it would have like hundreds of millions of citations just off humans alone, with ai agents contributing a lot to probably. now this assumes some kind of discontinuity. Most likely these things are gradual and so systems will adapt to it, it will never be this level of shock. Although if you think about the exponential, since the timestep that humans work with is more or less constant (again a huge assumption given that AI could help with this), eventually the increases would feel very discontinuous.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Be Worldly
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: be larger than life, be worldly.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Time and Logic Are Undefeated
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: they say time is undefeated. Logic is undefeated too.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Leaves to Heaven, Roots to Hell
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: they say that the leaves can only reach heaven if the roots reach hell. thus the overhuman has the two speeds, the two parallel realms, that he is master of. The going under to go over and beyond. Learn to be human and learn to be god. To get ever greater pain with your rise, the other side of it. for you to strive the hardest without looking back you first should know what is back there. go through all existential crisis or else you are an easy target. As the speed gets higher there is less and less time for those. Those you should've worked out before.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Note: Numbers 21 74
Idea: Quotes and Questions: Deep Thought and Sharp Blades
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: while having the deepest longest thought, you ought to be careful enough to also have a little of those small but fast thoughts, so you remember how much sense you have and how sharp are your blades.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Time Is Undefeated, So Is Progress
uncategorised.content: quotes and questions: time is undefeated, so is progress.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Don't Watch Without Doing
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: by looking at something amazing or beautiful long enough without doing any of it yourself you may become brain dead. Don't.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Comedy and Weightlessness
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: the thesis that the laugh in comedy is a weightless moment in existence. They said it. Now every moment, those moments where you don't think and go with the flow, where geodesics take you their path, are the weightless, but only when you think and gain consciousness a la Fernando Pessoa do you realize the weightlessness of the moment which is gone. Cause then you lose your not-specialness of reference frame. For a moment you were connected to any other thing, that just followed the geodesic like you.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Sadness Is Not Deeper Than Happiness
uncategorised.content: And people there are who think sadness is deeper than happiness. They leave out the apparently obvious way of living for it is shallow, they don't get to appreciate the infinite depth one can reach via the good way, without ever having to turn to other ways. Any one thing in life is deep enough to be the object of your attention and study for the whole of your life. You can always go deeper and make progress. Progress is the one truth of the world, besides time and those other perhaps more fundamental. It can be said, if time is the truth of the world then progress is the truth of life.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: YouTube Channel Idea
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: youtube channel could perhaps be called change my life.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Kierkegaard: Teleological Suspension and the Individual
uncategorised.content: Kierkegaard that a moment is all you got and a moment is all you ought to win, Kierkegaard draws the picture that individuality, your telos, can only be of the domain of the finite. Of the domain of zero measure. One eternal moment, and no more, which comes back to the paradoxical nature of the act of abraham, of the infinite movement that one cannot understand through one's corrupt system, like that of usain bolt. Perhaps hinting that morality is what one should surrender to, omnipresent to all moments and movements, yet beyond one's telos, beyond one's range. Dual and apparently in contradiction to the principle of the self that I get from Nietzsche. Of the will all powerful that one can bring about. Yet one would be limiting himself if himself was all that he had to count on. To be whole one, even more ambitious than previously, has to play with the mutual enhancement of the external and the internal, the overmoment the real, the eternal the ideal that yet gives strength to the killing of the moment, that we sacrifice beyond now our god, really ourselves, like abraham in his movement did. God did. We can get disattached to reality, as much as it can be useful and increasing of the will to power. The duality of the self contained teleologically suspended morality with the ever changing will driven telos of the self.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Not Lost in the General, Not Limited in the Individual
uncategorised.content: One doesn't get lost in the general, one doesn't get limited in the individual, one brings forth different kinds of powers, powers of necessity, one can complexifies yet also simplify his achievement of piece of mind. One has a place to surrender and a place to conquer. One is thus even more changeable. The weight he carries on his shoulders is that which he so wills.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The MMA Athlete's Tribute Beyond Themselves
uncategorised.content: This is the different breed that some mma athletes bring to the table, something beyond themselves that they pay tribute, that they owe on their life, that they must give themselves to.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Faith Brings the Individual Higher
uncategorised.content: I have doubts as to whether faith brings the individual lower or higher than god. Faith well pulled can make the individual transcend, rather than be a slave of an higher cause. In fact this may be the very challenge, what makes it hard to reconcile these two reactive beasts, these two antiparticles of a thing that must thus live in one's mind. You ought to believe in a higher power and yet be able to stare it in the face. You build fear out of yourself and out of yourself grows courage. There is overcoming.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Courage to Express Maximally
uncategorised.content: That one may have the courage to express himself maximally, his telos, beyond the infinite, the unfathomable infinite of the eternal that oversees it.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Hearing People Too Literally
uncategorised.content: And many times we and I make the mistake of hearing too literally what the people say. Maybe giving too much importance to that which comes out of the mouth in detriment of implicit action that they may or may not be aware, that they may or may not intend. In detriment of the feeling that powers those words, that they may or may not be aware, that they may or may not intend. That the real effects at times are not to be found in the meanings of the words, that language in this reduced sense is arbitrary and very particular, we forget that, that we may neglect the faith that may be powering the beliefs powering the words. We sometimes judge too much on what is said rather than the effect for oneself of saying that.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Open-Mindedness and the Infinite Faith
uncategorised.content: That encourages open mindedness and respect and tolerance for others' beliefs and thoughts and actions and words. Missing that is reducing the whole world to something not even we understand. So take advantage of all information that comes with a word. At the end of the day the maximum performant effective as in useful processing power in processing one second of the universe at every second, for you process it all, including yourself, in this convergent ever less adding series of informations that connect the whole. This argument actually has some problems. the point is that to express maximally not only do you want to be fluent in every language but you want to hear of them at once, never being stuck to one for one occasion, so you can wholistic understanding and win time. Not just gain time, but win time. With that processing power.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Greater Lesson: Faith as a Zero
uncategorised.content: The greater lesson we can draw from here with faith is that you don't want to neglect the paradoxical and that which doesn't fit in your system. Even for what doesn't fit paradoxically there should be space. Integrate into your ship, your arsenal, this touch of paradox, of unexplainable, touch of the reason of no reason. Faith in this sense is really a zero, whose invention made us more free. We don't need reasons so as to act on something, so as to win the world. Even without justifications we are able to do so in one movement. The history of finding zeroes is really one of writting off assumptions that limit our power. In essence really taking a meta faith on our power to have power, which leads us to get rid of the self created monsters. Assume you can do more with less. And that you already have a tremendous amount of things you want to do in this world, then you can afford to dare skip what you don't want, getting out of it only what you want with the minimum possible taken from your flight over and beyond the mere human.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Knight of Faith Acts Without Apparent Reason
uncategorised.content: That this movement of the infinite faith can only be integrated by a mind of such open mindedness that one doesn't think the world is absurd, but one doesn't reject the possibility that one can't even think of how absurd it is. Thus you must master the duality of both having absolute faith in yourself and yet by virtue of making faith part of your language knowing that the absurd may be out there. know that you may not know anything about the world yet going for it all the same. This is the courage only human is capable of, and only the human that can know so much to know he doesn't know and yet believe all the same.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Faith in Faith
uncategorised.content: Faith in faith, such is measured the spirit of your open mindedness. Wow again its a self referential self enforcing belief. Its not that one is controlled by the beliefs he controls, but that one controls the beliefs that one is controlled by.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Absurd as Excusable Obstacle
uncategorised.content: That the absurd is excusable, understandable as an obstacle to movement. That yet the higher and bolder faith in the absurd isn't, the absurd is always seen as something outside the will. Only an unbound will can hold within the controlled absurd, the belief in the absurd and its potential power to guide one. Thus an all encompassing will will have many traits, however closed or disclosed they shall be, they may never be used, but they shall be there for when one needs it. One can thus always rise to the occasion, as a matter of principle, that one may not shy away from the craziest of mental states and beliefs and faiths that others may find incoherent, contradictory, irrational.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Living All Possible Worlds
uncategorised.content: One doesn't shy away from the possibilities of worlds where no ethical guide is taken for decisions, unhinged worlds devoid of meaning or justification. One thus lets go of this notion as deemed necessary, rather its useful for this world. And what better example of information and language that you can take by simply believing the reality of possibility and acting on it, that you believe possibilities have their merits, in the quantum multiverse, and experience the whole world, not just the collapse onto this version of it. Do you understand, given you have sufficient processing power to capitalize on it, how much more powerful that the limited ones this makes you? How much advantage through time that passes that you gain, how much experience you gain

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Maximum Faith, Willing to Renounce Everything
uncategorised.content: Again mastering the duality between having maximum faith in all you are and all you do, yet be willing to renounce it all for nothing. No outcome, just an infinite fall of the leap of faith, that at times no ground is to be found through it. Some beings weren't made to fly when they jump off the cliff. Some do it out of shear belief, and that is a necessary but not sufficient condition thus we have determined.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Want It Most, Need It Least
uncategorised.content: one should understand what things one would go for at any price, yet be present enough that he can at any price get rid of everything he did in the name of the higher platform he so desperately yet so unneedly tries to cling on to. He wants it more than anyone yet needs it less than anyone. Thus I will that I will it.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Movement of Letting Go
uncategorised.content: Its a movement of letting go. Letting go of all life that one could have so maximized, to escape it. One denies the seeable and real and palpable and universally recognized victory for something he deems greater. And that now that you say it out loud can only be a tribute for the will of the individual under all of us, the individual over all of us, the individual over each of us (the first is the will that each possesses. The second the Kierkegaard god and the third the overus that comes out of self overcoming. In the movement of the infinite it gets hard to distinguish between all of these.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Easy to Never Encounter the Paradox
uncategorised.content: It is easy and by many people done to never encounter this paradoxical leap of faith, one can shy away from angst, which also never lets him see the infinite. One can perfectly live under the umbrella of life, knowing what one knows, seeing only what one knows and knowing only what one sees.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- At What Level Can You Talk to People?
uncategorised.content: At what level can you talk to people. Like talk to them, not just say things to them. Do you believe so little in them you have to say stuff just to be polite. Or you find them valuable and try to extract something from them. Or you are genuinely curious about them and thus are able to just hear them. But how deep do you get with them. In the sense that the more you both share with one another, and that can be through the usual common thing in one another or actually sharing, that is, explicitly becoming entangled with them, created as it were, then you are able to skip the higher levels and get to the real stuff. You don't need to seem polite, or interested for that matter. You may both only select the real value, seeing the whole thing as transactional. Or you may have shared so much you know both of you are there no matter what. So in the lower level you can motivate them, like give them pep talks, but if they are about it as much as you then they already know the motivation, they already have it, and you can start right away from a place of no exaggerations and no metaphors, you can speak reality. On what language are you able to speak with someone. On what grounds does your connection lay. Cause it can be grounded in a deep appreciation that both of you are trying to be the best version they can be.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Catching the Train II
uncategorised.content: Now we have accumulated an undefeated record one again of catching trains. Last time I wrote we had done the craziest journey there, and yet the last two times we took it levels above. Not sure if I wrote one where I went running from the stadium to the underground with cramps all over the calves, but after that there was one where I'd accepted I didn't have time to catch it simply, to change plans and go to saldanha on foot and then entrecampos catching the train at the second stop, the train was late and we got it. Today I was even later and arrived at the underground which pointed 8 minutes, so I had to bet that the train would arrive some 10 minutes late if I was to have any chance of catching it. Went and as I arrived it was already there and after getting in some 20 seconds later it went away.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Khabib and Islam: Language Beyond Motivation
uncategorised.content: Think of a coach and athlete relation, like khabib to islam. Do you think khabib has to be there motivating islam, of course not, they are on the same page and islam is already as motivated as anyone else. Khabib doesn't even need to give specific tips, with probably a couple words he can say more truth to islam than islam could read in an entire book.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Growing Through Language
uncategorised.content: This is how people grow and others may not realize, through their language. Motivation may have worked when they were just getting started, but they now evolved and they are so much beyond that. Their sensibility to truth has decreased, yet their radar for truth is ever more potent. You can emulate all lower levels but you aspire to surround yourself in an environment that pushes the highest level to be even greater still.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Having Children as a Singularity
uncategorised.content: And having kids is a singularity in your life. For the first time there is an order downwards, in that you have someone who by nature will live longer than you, only your children can in principle be at that level. Only they can match you from the get go. So you have it right there in front of you, something that goes beyond you yet is you. It is as close as what you can get to see how you would live in today's time were you there. you are presented with something that outgrows you, that extends you.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Note: Search Compliments
uncategorised.content: Search compliments and how to be great with them

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Immortality and Competition
uncategorised.content: Quotes and question: people are under this illusion that if they were given immortality, as in freedom to die whenever they'd want through suicide, they would have all the time in the world to do stuff, they could always leave stuff for later. Sure in a strict sense you have time for everything, but there are also infinite things to do, and if someone is 2x faster than you at everything they will do twice of you, given they are immortal too. The point is you live in the finite even if its forever, so there will always be competition and meaning to invest time, opportunity cost. Fundamentally there doesn't exist a ceiling on how good one can be. Non finiteness could even spark a more tense form of competition, since now you have to choose at every moment to keep living, that freedom means if you are to be immortal you will have to make that choice, no great filter or death will make you urgent, it will all have to come from within.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Fernando Pessoa: Clarity Without Thinking
uncategorised.content: Fernando pessoa: let this clarity of not thinking about things thinking, be that, clarity, a light that allows you to see things as they are.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Fernando Pessoa: Being All In
uncategorised.content: Fernando pessoa: The question of being all in is a major one. At some moments it feels like if you are not going all in for something it is not even worth it. Either it is a thing or it isn't. Theres tremendous power both in this and in the opposite, where you are able to ingrain something without even giving it all your soul and attention. Those innocent gains stack. But mostly, either there is something I can measure and see improvement, or I'm not gonna do it. Now this is for subgoals. for a whole life that encompasses all these goals, everyone is all in, whether they realize it or not, whether they want to believe it or not, whether they want to play this game or not, whether they want to know everyone is all in. You can say no rushes, no worries, no hurries, in your life, but then you see the bus coming and winning pulls you out of that hole, and there you go running to catch it, you won for you didn't have to wait 10 minutes for the next one. And as you naturally allow yourself to go after this, now you have something to keep pushing you, that those 10 minutes weren't for nothing. So now you put in the effort. In every action you either went for it or you didn't. There are no people who don't have wishes or ambitions. Those that say that most likely wish they didn't had wishes. for some things you went, some you didn't. But still the choice is binary. And it is good for you that you believe everyone is all in.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Note: Organic
uncategorised.content: Organic.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Self-Awareness and Judging Yourself Fairly
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: you want self awareness, the ability to judge yourself fairly, understanding the true level of performance you are at. This means you will feel worse even if you are better than someone who feels good, embrace that. You won't hide yourself your mistakes, you will cringe through them, but get better in the process.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Comparative Advantage and Task Allocation
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: with comparative advantage in life, its that there may be absolute advantage in doing something rather than another thing both now and later, but maybe now its easier to do the lesser thing than later, greater thing maintaining. Its about smart allocation of tasks you know you will have to do.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Frontier of Knowledge
uncategorised.content: When you are at the frontier of knowledge, right now with AI for example you will find both the best and the worst information. Capitalizing. you find you've been tunneled into people of your class. Society clusters, and you may think you are different, but maybe not, and maybe you only see those that chose the same path as you. Dangerous. you can only win if you give it all whether you have talent or not.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Caeiro's Peace and the Natural World
uncategorised.content: Fernando pessoa: alberto caeiro crê, acredita no mundo porque o vê, nao porque pensa nele. Nessa medida sugere me que estar na paz de caeiro é ser um com o mundo, estar de acordo com ele como o proprio diz. Sendo assim, tendo em conta o poema de cesario verde, é como se olhar para o mundo humano é inerentemente pensar no mundo, viver no mundo pensado, enquanto que a natureza proporciona o olhar sem pensar para o mundo.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Backed by God Paradox
uncategorised.content: Being in the paradox that you are backed by god, yet there being no such thing. You were chosen, every human comes equal, with nothing.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Athletic Performance Blueprint
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: this is a blueprint for athletic performance, hit every system.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Imbalance of Opportunity Cost
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: when there is an imbalance in the opportunity cost you now carry with you and the little value something is giving, which can be seen as little respect/acknowledgment of your great opportunity cost, it should be stopped.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Comparative Advantage of Desires
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions:. there is also a comparative advantage theory of desires. For someone eating well may be hugely important in their lives, whereas you may be of the kind that you can go through with anything. As we trade a lot of these things most of the time.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Nature vs Man-Made Observation
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: just like in AI, where real world data carries with it more relations that we know and that AI can leverage to get better, looking at nature is superior to looking, observing man made things, for the depth of the latter is finite, as opposed to the former, where no limits are there. A movie, if you are looking only at the human aspect and not the human inside the nature, has less, is limited, watching nature directly is limitless, it wasn't programmed, there is more to discover.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Fernando Pessoa on Seeing the Visible
uncategorised.content: Fernando pessoa: And the not quite there yet man will see nature for its beauty, not for being itself. and it is hard to see only the visible, to not see beyond it. Hard to not be contaminated by the world of ideas, that you look and can't attribute any word to that you see. Its hard to pay attention without thinking. Hard to put the mind still. Hard to forget all that you learned and it betrays you when you look at the things that weren't created out of your learnings, but from which human learnings derive. Hard to see for what they are. Hard to strike reality. Hard to unsee in something all that you already saw and you think is the same. To look with new eyes and new brain. To experience a totally different world from that you teached yourself. To at every moment be born anew to the eternal newness of the world, one needs this.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Active Effort and Avoiding Stability
uncategorised.content: Just like without active effort you are going to end up surrounded by people similar in condition to you, if you don't intentionally put in effort, you are going to end up very very similar to your parents. So many times you see the chaos of youth end up unravelling into stability of someone around one of their parents. They settle for that.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Blessing of Finding Nothing
uncategorised.content: Its actually a blessing that when you search something up, some feeling some way of doing, you don't find anything and you have to do it yourself. It means you are onto something new, and you won't get discouraged cause someone already did it. You gonna have to actually make your own unique product. turn it into reality. You wouldn't want these things that you found in your head to be solved, no, you can't satisfy right away those desires. They remain open loops so that you have to get back to them and these visions of yours onto the world. True, you are mad that no one understands what you mean, and theres nothing about it, there isn't the perfect book or video that is going to show you the solution. You have to carve it yourself, and only you have it in your mind to. A constant notification. One underestimates the power of keeping things in the mind for a long time, everything else that you see in the meantime reflects off of that hanging thing. You always have a thing to go back to and do. You know you'll never run out of things, that you keep this list of things that you or other versions of you would do, but you are an apex predator, you go after different versions of you. In some timelines you win more in life than others, but this yours one you go after every way of winning that all the branches have produced. That is the multitude into one of being that you seek. Thats also what it means to become the best version of yourself. Its given all versions making them all together, getting all other versions together. And there are many things that I say I would do if this was just one more life and wasn't the life. If some god gave me an extra life in which whatever happens here doesn't affect the actual life, I would do tattoos no doubt, I would watch a lot of shows and play some games I wished. If this was another life I would enjoy addicting to gta vi. Or watch breaking bad. Or screw brain damage and go full in on mma.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Meta-Thinking and the Ultimate Timeline
uncategorised.content: This is the kind of meta thinking. You can appreciate distilled and compressed portions of those things, but this is the life above every other, one can't afford to get lost on one timeline. And trust me all the greater things come in a bunch. As mankind evolves, the best time to play games is now, the best time to do AI is now, the best time to do sport is now. All the great things come together, so going for one is necessarily a huge opportunity cost that has to be measured with the value brought by it.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Chosen and Backed by God
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions continuation: you can consider yourself chosen. Favored by god. Backed by god. You were chosen and embraced, and love at once came and was. Its not the same mood of elevation as that temporary energy burst, its not explosive, just smoothly flying in the clouds. Not some extraordinary rise and fall, but a movement of the baseline itself. Something that doesn't leave you. Something that adds to you and becomes you.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Paradox of Preparation
uncategorised.content: The paradox that life is unpredictable and you should be a master of unpredictability yet have the intentions of preparing definitely. So believing that when you get out of today, for example, you will know for your life everything necessary about relationships. You dive super deep so as to close the loop. The paradox is that this belief is good and will translate into real action and consequence, but you will eventually have to get back to the topic of relationships, whether a posteriori, or to remember things, or to actually understand things you saw previously in a better way, now that you are in a position to understand them. So learning is continuous, so is doing, even if your best intention may be to break it into blocks. So every loop is open, and may seem closed only approximately. que o dia morre todos os dias

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Apex Predator Competition
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: This apex predator concept is for competing against yourself,

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Reading, Writing, and the Urgency of Time
uncategorised.content: And this thing that you will be writing instead of reading, well this places a bound on what you will read. Possibly you already know every book you will read in your life. This is true for many people of course that don't read but for you that devour it seems weird, yet as you read more you have more to say, and it becomes harder to stay shut. So geometrically you will read less, you may reach an asymptote. Now of course you may also read some of the works that are coming in the future and whose authors may not even be born yet, but those its hard to know about. Cause I find I read slower the greater works like Zarathustra, so urgency is needed, select very well what you read, just like anything you do really. Thats how you solve to some extent the massive regret and disappointment you find in the end of life, looking back at what you could have done by preparing now. By noticing how fast time flies before it takes flight. Before you embark on it. It does fly ever faster, and if you only know that after the fact you will regret it. People say how time flies, yet seem to do nothing about it

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Levels of Urgency
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: there are levels to urgency. You understand that as things happen to you. There are different levels to urgency. The breaking bad urgency. You get glimpses of higher levels.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Some Movies Change You
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: Some movies and sceneries inspire you, rise your immediate will, your rage to change, your power to act now. Some inspire thoughts, bring to surface things. With some you increase your aliveness, with others you learn, you discover, you create. But with a special few, you change. Immediately the chip goes in, immediately you know your duties, and you not only see a new reality but take it as your own, you incorporate it and your flesh is stitched where this reality caused the wound. It opened a gate from this reality to yours. You see it immediately. It goes right into your soul and purifies it with some of its water. The purest is water. The simple yet pure, so each reality brings its pure water. There is no need for thought. This is pure assimilation. This is observing the world as it is. No confusions. There are no open loops that your thought works and grinds to close. It presents to you naturally. You become something else right at that interception point. You only hear your breathing, that which in so much time of meditation fails you. You are truthful for once.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Memorizing vs Understanding
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: if you memorize something you don't understand it. You can simply incorporate what you understand. It now comes from within. Now there is admittedly some sexiness to memorizing, it makes parts of stories feel more concrete, for you know exactly who said what, and the date... It makes it good to know of some famous people others admire to have said something, but it takes away from your truth.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Tragedy of Stopped Potential
uncategorised.content: That we didn't get to see the best of kobe. Thats insane. That we deserved to see more and he deserved to get more. Imagine being ready to win so much more, we don't know quite how much, and being stopped short. Perhaps instead of a basketball player we would call him after his life a master of life.

uncategorised.title: Idea: What is Life With Mind and Matter and Autobiographical Sketches- Low Standard to Write, High Standard to Mean It
uncategorised.content: You gotta master the duality between having low standard for what you write down, in that you don't see anything as too crazy, in fact it both loses and gains reality when you write something down, so that you are free from judgment, so that your thoughts may roam free. Yet have a very great standard of what deserves writing down. For when you get writing good thoughts here and there you may find yourself forcing the greatness of them just to say nothing. Like in podcasts that there are so many and they think they have something to say. Only say something when you have something to say.

uncategorised.title: Idea: What is Life With Mind and Matter and Autobiographical Sketches- Two Types of 'Good Question'
uncategorised.content: Two types of people. Those who say good question when they don't know the answer, when it goes beyond their script, and those who say good question when they know it and it is part of their script.

uncategorised.title: Idea: What is Life With Mind and Matter and Autobiographical Sketches- Natural Selection Acts on Itself
uncategorised.content: That natural selection acts on itself, that those who have genes that are too mutable, in that they are too sensitive to mutation, will most likely mutate into non survival paths. So it's natural selection that selects the properties of the selection process, namely the mutation process and others.

uncategorised.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: The Challenge of Learning and Creating Languages
uncategorised.content: Quotes and questions: people are not aware of how hard it is to learn a language from scratch, when you hear a language you haven't heard its not that you just don't understand the meaning, but that you can't keep up. It goes so fast, your ability of compression being zero invalidates your understanding. It even seems way less information is conveyed, you only hear a couple of sounds and if you were to create a language for you and a couple others, you would soon run the risk of not having working memory to talk. Every freakin word requiring an associated sound and way of writing. By hand it comes hard, unless the language is computable, you have some rules for it which make further compression possible. So creating languages and maximizing certain things within them is in the realm of tractability of computers, not us.

uncategorised.title: Idea: The Double Helix A Personal Account of the Discovery of the Structure of DNA- How Many People Onto Something?
